programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Could It Be You?
programme.desc: Nikki meets her soul mate.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: A Little Change Never Hurt Anybody
programme.desc: Nikki’s in love – but not with the Professor!
programme.sub-title: A Little Change Never Hurt Anybody

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: At Last
programme.desc: Nikki’s wedding has a shocking effect on Oglevee.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Scammed Straight
programme.desc: Cash-strapped college students Nikki and Kim Parker become a mother-daughter telephone psychic team.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Grape Nuts
programme.desc: When Nikki, Kim and Stevie pledge with a sorority they are ordered to 'expose' Professor Oglevee.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: THE BOOMERANG EFFECT
programme.desc: With Nikki’s help, the school geek becomes the campus hottie.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: DADDY’S GIRL
programme.desc: Kim overhears some shocking news after moving in with her father.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Taking Tae-bo, With My Beau
programme.desc: After accidentally injuring Professor Oglevee, Nikki becomes his round-the-clock nurse.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: One Day At A Time
programme.desc: Andi discovers getting what she wants isn't all it's cracked up to be. Karen resolves not to make the same mistake as Andi. Sabrina's next venture with Calvin deepens her fears. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: No Judgement
programme.desc: Andi struggles to keep her personal life and job separate. Developments in Karen's love life poses new possibilities. Sabrina provides the voice of wisdom to her friends. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Boy Bye
programme.desc: Andi acts quickly to help a fallen friend. A misunderstanding leaves Karen in a precarious and heartbreaking situation. Danni starts to address rumors she's caught wind of. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Old Faithful
programme.desc: Andi finds herself stuck between a rock and a hard place. Danni sets out to find the truth among her friends. Sabrina finally starts to open up to Calvin. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Acceptance
programme.desc: Danni's relationship with an unlikely person develops in an unexpected twist. Aaron recruits Andi's help. Sabrina tries to figure out the shift in Karen's attitude. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: The Game: Before The Parade Passes By
programme.desc: Melanie tries to convince Derwin to attend a victory parade for the Sabers. He reluctantly agrees but ends up running into Janay, who decides to put his feelings for Melanie to the test.

programme.title: The Game: The Lord Givens...And The Lord Taketh Away
programme.desc: Malik begins dating Robin Givens and soon realizes that his methods to dating may have been working against him.
programme.sub-title: The Lord Givens...And The Lord Taketh Away

programme.title: The Game: Got 99 Problems And My Chick Is One
programme.desc: After Melanie accepts a gift from Derwin, Jerome begins to question her commitment to their relationship.
programme.sub-title: Got 99 Problems And My Chick Is One

programme.title: The Game: Baby Come Back
programme.desc: The new coach seems more interested in getting to know Kelly than with making a new deal with Jason.

programme.title: The Game: Baby On Board
programme.desc: Melanie finally confesses to Derwin that she is in love with him, but soon after, Derwin tells her about Janay's pregnancy.

programme.title: The Game: Mel-Odrama
programme.desc: Melanie has a confrontation with Janay when she thinks that Janay may be lying about her pregnancy with Derwin's baby.

programme.title: The Game: Just When I Thought I Was Out, She Pulls Me Back In
programme.desc: While Rick is ready to make their relationship public, Tasha refuses to do so and goes out of her way to keep it a secret from their co-workers.
programme.sub-title: Just When I Thought I Was Out, She Pulls Me Back In

programme.title: The Game: Just The Three Of Us
programme.desc: Melanie feels jealous after Derwin goes with Janay to her first pregnancy appointment.

programme.title: The Game: A Delectable Basket Of Treats
programme.desc: Tasha boycotts Malik's marriage to Robin Givens, fearing that their marriage is a scam.

programme.title: The Game: Brittany's Super Sweet Sixth
programme.desc: When Kelley's daughter tells her she wants an extravagant birthday party like the rest of her friends, Kelly approaches Jason for money and he refuses.

programme.title: Run's House: JoJo Wins and Justine Loses
programme.desc: After overindulging at Russell Simmons' remarkable star-studded charity bash in the Hamptons, Justine decides to go on a diet. Determined to make it work, she enlists the help of a personal trainer.

programme.title: Run's House: Run's Family Vacation
programme.desc: When Vanessa gets a call from her Ford modeling agent to do a fashion shoot in Colorado, Run decides that bringing the family along for a summer vacation would be the perfect adventure to share before school starts.

programme.title: Run's House: Baby Fever
programme.desc: Looking at baby photos sparks Justine's desire to have another baby. Rev Run tries to convince Justine otherwise, but she is certain about what she wants.

programme.title: Run's House: A Healthy Heart
programme.desc: Run finds a dead fish in the family's tank and gives it a proper send-off with a prayer: "Ashes to ashes and flush to flush."

programme.title: Run's House: All Work & No Peace
programme.desc: Run heads to New York's Z100 radio station to speak with DJ Cubbie and promote his new album 'Distortion.' But Run is starting to feel the pressure of working and running a company.

programme.title: Run's House: Maximum Growth
programme.desc: Vanessa is approached to pose in Maxim Magazine, but is concerned about her father's reaction. Meanwhile, Jojo tries to pass his "behind-thewheel" test for his Driver's Permit. And the Rev gets a "sign" to buy a new Lamborghini.

programme.title: Run's House: Vegas Vacation
programme.desc: Rev has a shoe convention to attend in Las Vegas and takes the family with him. Rev enlists help from Vanessa and Angela to plan a surprise for Justine.

programme.title: Run's House: Rev's Fix It List
programme.desc: Some of Rev's husbandly habits are wearing thin on Justine and leaving her feeling disrespected. Rev is shocked to hear that there are a "few" things to improve and challenges Justine to make a list.

programme.title: Run's House: Rev Mom
programme.desc: Rev and Justine discover that Justine is pregnant. As the family deals with the news Justine realizes that she has plenty she wants to accomplish before she feels immobilized by her pregnancy.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Award Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee invites Mona to a big awards ceremony honoring their father in an effort to have everyone together as one big happy family, but Dee Dee’s good intentions once again leave Mona out in the cold

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Sistah Sans Soul Episode
programme.desc: After Mona is dumped by a guy who accuses her of not being black enough, Mona tries to find her inner Sistah until Dee Dee helps her realize that she should be happy with who she is
programme.sub-title: The Big Sistah Sans Soul Episode

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Ex-pectations Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee starts dating a guy who, as it turns out, was Mona’s ex-high school boyfriend and her first.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lady Vampire
programme.desc: PRS investigates a case involving single mom, Dawn, and her 5-year-old daughter, both of whom are tormented by the appearance of a hag they call "lady vampire."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Knickerbocker
programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37
programme.desc: Darrell and Cherry, the owners of an historic Tennessee bed and breakfast built in the late 1800s, are reporting apparitions of a man and hearing whistling throughout the hotel corridors.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Beer, Wine and Spirits
programme.desc: Brian's bar has a cranky customer who's got a bad habit of breaking wine glasses. Charlie has been dead since prohibition.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery
programme.desc: PRS visits a gothic graveyard, where a jealous spirit seems to be preying on the newlywed wife of the cemetery's caretaker. Ryan traces the haunting to a mysterious, unclaimed cremation urn on the grounds.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Hostage to Fear
programme.desc: P.R.S. is summoned to help a family who has been haunted for years by spirits lurking in the house. Upon arrival the team finds a family that has become prisoners in their own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Mothman
programme.desc: Ryan takes his team to Point Pleasant, West Virginia to investigate his own personal holy grail of paranormal lore: the mysterious Mothman.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vegas
programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Basement
programme.desc: A history of violence may connect the spiritual activity in Heidi's Ohio home to a long run of misery and cruelty.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks
programme.desc: PRS is called to a New Jersey beauty salon, but they soon learn that the building's proximity to deadly train tracks might be the true cause of spirit activity.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24 and S26
programme.desc: Yvette and her team continue their investigation, moving from the cellar to the upper floors. While Yvette and Glen explore the auditorium, something follows Karl upstairs, and the rest of the team captures some of their best evidence yet.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24 and S26
programme.desc: Yvette takes her team to the mysterious Guys Cliffe House, once a private dwelling, it is now home to the Fraternal Brotherhood of Freemasons. The team are followed by a very persistent poltergeist that will seem to stop at nothing to get their attention.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24 and S26
programme.desc: Yvette and her team continue their investigation into this mysterious place. With something seemingly stalking the crew the night ends with a particularly vigorous spirit in a very small room.

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads Most Haunted to Accrington's old police station and courts, housing playful spirits and malevolent entities. Is the evil too much for the team?

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT2
programme.desc: The second part of Yvette Fielding and the Most Haunted team's investigation at the now-abandoned old police station and courts in Accrington. With the team splitting up to cover as much space as they can, something seems to be stalking them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT3
programme.desc: The third and final part of this terrifying and intriguing investigation into the paranormal activity at Accrington’s Old Police Station and Courts.

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding is back with the first part of a brand-new episode of Most Haunted. The intrepid ghost hunter has taken her team to the historic hall, which is said to be haunted by ancestral ghosts, the apparition of a white lady and a demon dog.

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt2
programme.desc: Watch the second part of Yvette Fielding and the Most Haunted team's investigation of a historic hall, where the paranormal activity includes the disembodied sounds of children laughing and crying and the apparition of a white lady.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads her team in a two-part investigation at the foreboding Gloucester Prison, one of Britain's most haunted places, known for its history of death, fear, pain, suicide, and incarceration

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt2
programme.desc: The second part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation of the imposing and abandoned Gloucester Prison.

programme.title: Most Haunted: GLOUCESTER PRISON Pt3
programme.desc: The third part of Yvette Fielding and the team's investigation into the very haunted and abandoned Gloucester Prison. With the team splitting up the activity rises and something is trying to stop Yvette and Glen.

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads team in a violent, secret investigation. Place's name and location concealed due to extreme haunting. Little history, aggressive entities a mystery. Can they reveal the darkness and face the unknown?

programme.title: Most Haunted: SECRET LOCATION PT2
programme.desc: Most Haunted's deadliest investigation, Part 2. Spirits emerging, team's resolve tested as darkness envelops. Growing fear, team's safety at stake. Can they continue?

programme.title: Most Haunted S24 and S26
programme.desc: Yvette and the Most Haunted team are invited to the inner sanctum of the Freemasons to investigate the many ghost sightings at Clifton Hall. Even before the investigation starts the team are faced with some of strange phenomena witnessed by others.

programme.title: Most Haunted S24 and S26
programme.desc: Part two of their investigation into Clifton Hall sees the team splitting with going it alone. For one of the team the night becomes terrifying as they find themselves locked in a room with an unseen force.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Investment In Caring
programme.desc: Jonathan encourages residents in a neighborhood to unite against a cold-hearted developer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Right Thing
programme.desc: Jonathan inspires a young man to help the grandfather who has recently been placed in a nursing home.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Thoroughbreds - Part 1
programme.desc: Lizzy MacGill is a horse trainer's young daughter who elopes with Garth Armstrong, a privileged man.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Thoroughbreds - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help Lizzie. The new bride has cancer and she is pregnant.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Song for Jason - Part 1
programme.desc: Mark and Jonathan become counselors at a camp for children with cancer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Song for Jason - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are helping patients at Camp Good Times in different ways. But a father still refuses to deal with his son's illness.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Bless the Boys in Blue
programme.desc: Jonathan relinquishes his angelic powers for awhile and realizes the dangers that Mark has faced being a police officer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Cindy
programme.desc: An aspiring actress wants to be accepted for who she really is, not in the image her well-meaning dad tries to transform her into.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Devil and Jonathan Smith
programme.desc: Mark has been tricked into selling his soul in order to save a little girl's life. But the Devil has another agenda: acquiring Jonathan's soul.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Factory workers ignore ground-water contamination, even though it is making their children sick. As a result, Jonathan takes drastic measures to force them to face the facts.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Popcorn, Peanuts and Crackerjacks
programme.desc: A minor-league baseball team never wins, so Jonathan and Mark set out to help them. They also come to the aid of an elderly vendor who has been kicked out of the stadium.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Smile in the Third Row
programme.desc: The lead actor in a Broadway play claims that God is attending the show's performances, sitting in a third-row orchestra seat.
programme.sub-title: The Smile in the Third Row

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Secret
programme.desc: The teenage daughter of Mark's friend tries to find her biological mother. It may tear the family apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Monster - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark connect a young blind woman with a disfigured artist.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Monster - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty is on hand to provide legal assistance. He defends the young artist with a facial deformity who has been accused of assaulting a blind girl.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark go to work at a football team. They learn that one of the players has been getting drugs from the team doctor.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Alone
programme.desc: A homeless boy wishes that someone would love him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Close Encounters of the Heavenly Kind
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help a bullied orphan whose eccentric grandfather is in danger of losing him to a heartless social worker.
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Heavenly Kind

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Alice and Danny are called out by a farmer who's trapped an African Wild Dog. As they're even more endangered than cheetahs and much more vicious, Danny and Alice are amazed to see one up close.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: When Du Plessis instructs the family to be around for dinner, they are intrigued to hear he's planning a big announcement. However, he won't be drawn on details and tells them to be patient.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Alice and Danny are delighted when the Animal Hospital is given responsibility for the rescue and conservation of animals in the region – it's a big achievement after all their hard work.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are concerned about a missing male giraffe but Du Plessis is confident he can find him. He's as good as his word but they're upset to discover Mara lions have killed the giraffe.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: The family frantically dig for Charlotte in the rubble, hoping that somehow she has survived. Rowan arrives and takes charge of the situation, directing them to be more methodical in their rescue efforts.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are enjoying being together but agree to keep their relationship under wraps for the moment. However, they're unaware Georgina has heard their every word!

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: Danny and Alice's project to re-habilitate a group of circus elephants has been a huge success but now they have too many elephants on Leopard's Den, so they urgently need to move the circus herd to the National Park.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Leopard's Den is helping to build a new school in the township but when Danny hurts his back he begins to have a crisis about his age. Danny and Alice are surprised when Vanessa comes to them for advice.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: Mara is hosting a beauty pageant and Rowan realises he needs all the publicity he can get. He buys a tiger from a zoo and convinces Alice he plans to rehabilitate it. Alice is enjoying working with her brother and even defends him to Danny.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny and Alice have been preparing a cheetah for release in the wild but for some reason Danny's mind isn't on the job. He's been pre-occupied because he plans to buy a ring and propose to Alice!

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Danny and Alice are taking a well deserved holiday but Olivia's upset to learn they're leaving that day. Angry at missing out on a driving lesson, she decides to take the jeep out on her own.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: Alice is enjoying her new job at Mara even though her animal census has revealed they have a lone male hyena that needs a pack. Du Plessis isn't happy about Alice working for next door.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Danny's continued estrangement from Alice is really starting to take its toll. Over at Mara, Alice puts on a brave face as she meets Tom Cox, the owner of a rare male black leopard.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Caroline returns to find that all is not well at Leopard's Den. Danny has been putting a brave face on his ban but his attempts at helping out around the house are getting on everyone's nerves and Alice is finding his back-seat vetting especially hard.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: Danny is delighted to have his veterinary license back again and being back at work is helping to distract him from the impending anniversary of Sarah's death.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: Du Plessis is restless after his heart surgery but the family insist he needs to relax. Meanwhile Danny and Alice are happy to have closed down a zoo down that has been mistreating animals.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: While on honeymoon in London, Alice discovers that Danny has some final business to do before they can return home to Africa. He's reluctantly arranged to meet his estranged father, Robert, who has recently got back in touch.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny is throwing himself into his work after the death of his father, and has applied for the role of State Vet. However, Danny's attempts to involve Thabo in the first phase of the Lion Breeding Project lead to Du Plessis feeling like an outsider.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: It is Danny's first day as State Vet and when he helps rescue some smuggled animals he feels he's making a difference. However, he discovers the role isn't going to be all plain sailing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn’t come home from work and the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Beautiful Shade of Death
programme.desc: When police discover the lifeless bodies of Sophia Gerardo, four children and a house cat, they suspect ritualistic mass murder. But Lt. Joe Kenda uncovers a reality far more frightening.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: Kenda encounters one of the most horrendous crime scenes of his career, but his hunt for a homicidal maniac leads him to the most unexpected of killers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: A card game is interrupted by gunfire, leaving a young man dead. Lt. Joe Kenda soon learns the seeds of his destruction were sewn earlier the same day.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Avert Your Eyes
programme.desc: When Pamela Edwards is found shot through the heart, Lt. Joe Kenda’s first task is to shield her young daughters from the horrendous scene.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Sex, Lies, and Surveillance Tape
programme.desc: A confrontation between enemies turns deadly, and Lt. Joe Kenda’s best hope for answers lies with a grainy, dubbed-over surveillance tape.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Loose Cannon
programme.desc: In the dead of night, a shooter on a rampage rips through a home, leaving a grandmother disfigured, her 24 year old daughter dead, and a two year-old child clinging to life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Now Pronounce You Dead
programme.desc: Mother of 3 Dianne Hood is shot to death by a masked gunman on her way home from a Lupus support meeting. Joe Kenda uncovers a sordid web of lust and greed, revealing a killer no one ever expected.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: We Kill the Ones We Love
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves Van Terry dead; to crack the case, Lt. Joe Kenda must put his faith… in a burglar.
programme.sub-title: We Kill the Ones We Love

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Pop Goes the Witness
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Willie McCarty is found at the base of a staircase. Neighbors direct Kenda to a truck spotted fleeing the scene, but a surprise visitor at CSPD turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the “victim” could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Second Case
programme.desc: A woman’s mangled body is found beside a lonely stretch of highway. When the coroner suspects foul play, Kenda is called in to solve the second homicide case of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Maya, Sara, and Lilly
programme.desc: Maya, an adopted Border Collie/Spring Spaniel Mix loves to jump but is hurting her owner’s neck. Next we meet Sara, an overly-aggressive Shepherd mix and Lilly, a pushy Poodle.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bullying Bulldog
programme.desc: Bulldog Buster is prone to biting and growling. Sadie, a 3 month old Beagle/terrier mix, is frightened of trash cans. Lacey develops anxiety at 11 years of age.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Maxwell, Brooklyn, and Tipper
programme.desc: A spoiled Welsh Sealyham Terrier has dominance issues; an excitable English Mastiff has behavioral issues, and a territorial Tibetan Terrier needs help accepting other dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Anti-Social Sasha
programme.desc: Sasha, a pound pup, is perfect in the house, but outside she shows aggression towards other dogs. Angler, a Lab, is blind, and exhibits strange behavior around food.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sophie & Daisy
programme.desc: Sophie, a Sheltie-Golden nix, tries to nip at the heels of her owner’s horse. Daisy has an annoying problem – she tries to “hump” various members of the Benda family.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Special: 100th Episode Celebration
programme.desc: Participants from more than 200 stories featured on Dog Whisperer parade down the red carpet to celebrate the 100th Episode of Dog Whisperer with Cesar Millan.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Greta & Hoss, Storm, and Chula
programme.desc: Cesar helps a young Akita control his aggression; Newfoundland is the world's pickiest eater; two-year old Shiba Inu has a knack for bolting out open doors.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sunshine & Teddy
programme.desc: Sunshine is a champion Doberman in the show ring but far too aggressive in the street. Teddy, a yellow lab, has bitten its owner twice, and has attacked more than one stranger.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Snickers and Maury
programme.desc: After being attacked by another dog, Snickers has become aggressive with both dogs and humans. Can previously unadoptable Maury get a second chance?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Coach & Sueki
programme.desc: Coach, an out of control Boxer, bit a neighbor, seemingly sealing his fate. Coach gets a stay of execution when Cesar Millan comes to the rescue. Sueki refuses to walk on the leash.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Ava & Gus
programme.desc: Ava, a Pug/Pekingese swiftly twirls for all occasions, possibly a neurological condition Cesar cannot treat. Gus the Bouvier greets people by throwing his 100 pound body at them.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Caper & Julius
programme.desc: Caper has a lot of energy, particularly when it comes to chasing down balls non-stop. Julius is a four-year-old Pit Bull mix that is frightened of everything.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sonny, Cinnamon & Chocolate, and Boo
programme.desc: Pug and pet pig get rowdy; emotionally scarred Shepherd; two Dachshunds make an unsavory mix.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Major Jones, Josie, and Scrappy
programme.desc: Catchup with the hurricane Katrina rescue dogs. Is a reunion with their owners in store for any of them? A German Shephard learns to walk on a leash. A lab won’t walk on hardwood floors.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cricket and Hemingway & Rigby
programme.desc: Musicians Ashlee Simpson-Wentz and "Fall Out Boy" Pete Wentz, are concerned at the aggression coming from Hemingway, their English bulldog, especially since they are expecting their first child.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: High Anxiety
programme.desc: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner. Can Cesar help?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bear & Angel and Lorelei
programme.desc: Two German Shepherds develop an aggressive relationship when they begin going to day care. Then a miniature Schnauzer begins to bark and nip at her owner’s grandchildren.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Inside Puppy Mills
programme.desc: This powerful episode delves into the horror of puppy mills and the rescue and rehab of traumatized pups by the Last Chance for Animals non-profit organization.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Lotus Blossoms
programme.desc: A jealous dachshund learns to get along with both of his owners. Can Cesar exorcize a demon possessed German Shepherd that prevents his people from entering certain rooms of the house.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Chloe and various dogs
programme.desc: Cesar Millan joins the volunteers of United Hope for Animals to rescue stray pets, and to educate the citizens of Tijuana about the serious problem of overpopulation of dogs and cats in Mexico.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: On a Los Angeles beach, a team of lifeguards led by Lieutenant Mitch Buchannon saves lives, deals with personal tragedies, fights crime, and participates in extraordinary adventures every day.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Candlestick, The Diner, From the Agency, The Magic Rose Garden, The Jeep.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Kirby, Dust, Malibu Cop, A Joyful Noise, The Hooded Chair.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Bon Voyage, The Man in the Model T, The Scoop, Angel on Board, Buenos Dias.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Second Sight, The Fine Line, The Wrong Turn, Who Was I, You Are Next.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Fire Station 32, The Computer, The Girl Next Door, The Wallet, The Woods.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Wealthy Widow, The Witness, The Accident, Bad Dreams, Mental.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Devil's Autograph, Mail Order Degree, The News Stand, The Murder of Roy Hennessey, Mysterious Strangers.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Dealer, Gratuity, The Cake, 1st Time Offender, The Mirror of Truth.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Wonderful World/Orson Awards/Garfield Workout
programme.desc: Jon, Garfield and Odie head to the Wonder World amusement park./Roy and Orson's brothers scheme to get the big award./Garfield shows some of his favorite exercises.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Neighbours
programme.desc: In this story of neighbourhood social angst, Bob is having a complex burglar alarm installed by Graham, a sad, lonely man whose confidence is lifted immeasurably by this rare sale to Bob.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob Gets Wired
programme.desc: When Margaret forgets to pay for some sprinkles at the local cake shop, she is hauled in as a shoplifter.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: No Trouble
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Trouble with Mummy
programme.desc: Bob is concerned when he hears that his mother's best friend Pearl has passed on.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Fly on the Wall
programme.desc: Feeling belittled by his family, Bob jumps at the chance to be the subject of a fly on the wall documentary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Problems
programme.desc: At her clinic one-day, Margaret sees an old school chum, and invites her and her husband Matt to dinner.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair
programme.desc: When a patient dies of natural causes while in Bob's surgery, the local papers pick up the story?
programme.sub-title: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Cuckoo in the Nest
programme.desc: When Bobs old friend Clive, (who is a real drunken slob), is dumped by his wife, Bob lets him stay for a few days despite Margaret's objections?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A New Life
programme.desc: At a creepy chiropodist social night, Bob and Margaret encounter a couple who are rapturous about the new planned community where they now live.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret arrive home from another boring evening out with dreary friends, to find that their dogs behaviour has taken a turn for the worse?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Party Politics
programme.desc: Margaret runs into a distant friend who asks her to have an Ann Summers-type party in her home.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Margaret enters a contest and wins the grand prize: a cycling tour of Holland!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: My Foot Hurts
programme.desc: Margaret gets her own local call-in radio show entitled My Foot Hurts. On the first day, nervous and short on callers, she mentions her favourite curry house on the air?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Bob or Two
programme.desc: Bob buys an inexpensive painting from the neighbours at a junk sale (mostly motivated by pity since these neighbours have fallen on hard times) and hangs it in his surgery to brighten things up?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Stranded in Toronto
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret take a trip to New York, their flight is re-routed to Toronto due to a storm.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Margaret Gets a Job
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have made the big move to Canada.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Til Death Do Us
programme.desc: Bob gets conned into buying a cemetery plot for Margaret as a surprise 15th wedding anniversary gift.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Fish at the Bat
programme.desc: Bob gets cajoled into joining his office softball team.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Over-Exposed
programme.desc: Margaret accidentally picks up her neighbour's photos at the pharmacy.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Book Club
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret join a book club in the hopes of expanding their tiny social horizon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: On Location
programme.desc: A film crew sets up shop on Bob and Margaret's street, giving them a small and unsavory taste of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Cottage Country
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret get invited up to the cottage of Dr. Yoselheiffer, President of the Canadian Council of Dentists.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Driving Bob
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have put it off for too long. They need to get their Canadian drivers' licenses.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Undefined Border
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret go cross-border shopping in the United States.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Age Before Beauty
programme.desc: Margaret gets a new hairstyle but Bob doesn't even notice.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: New Lease on Life
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have near-death experience when Bob nearly crashes their car.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Jury Duty
programme.desc: Margaret gets called to Jury Duty but Bob has planned a holiday for them and begs her to get herself excused.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: All Things Fat and Small/Robin Hog/Hare Replacement
programme.desc: Jon goes river rafting./Orson gets caught up in his book on the bandit of Sherwood./Jon's magic act runs into trouble.
programme.sub-title: All Things Fat and Small/Robin Hog/Hare Replacement

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Stick To It/Orson In Wonderland/For Cats Only
programme.desc: Garfield tells Odie to stay in one spot./During a croquet game Orson finds a large hole./Garfield hosts a special, on KAT TV.
programme.sub-title: Stick To It/Orson In Wonderland/For Cats Only

programme.desc: Garfield addresses viewers comments./Orson drills a well for water./Jon follows the advice of a Wise man.
programme.sub-title: Mistakes Will Happen/The Well Dweller/The Wise Man

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Star Struck/Election Daze/Dirty Business
programme.desc: Garfield writes his own script for the show./The weasel convinces Roy to suggest an election./Jon visits his cousin Berferd.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Legend of Cactus Jupiter/U.S Acres: Birthday Boy Roy/Jukebox Jon
programme.desc: Garfield dreams of being pioneers in outer space./Roy gets a watch for his birthday./Jon's attempt to break a habit by listening to a record in his sleep.
programme.sub-title: The Legend of Cactus Jupiter/U.S Acres: Birthday Boy Roy/Jukebox Jon

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Squeak Previews/U.S Acres: Dr. Jekyll & Mr. Wade/A Tall Tale
programme.desc: Two mice critics review a documentary./Wade is mistakenly hypnotized to turn into a monster./The network insists that Nermal tell a story.
programme.sub-title: Squeak Previews/U.S Acres: Dr. Jekyll & Mr. Wade/A Tall Tale

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Moo Cow Mutt/ Big Bad Buddy Bird/Angel Puss
programme.desc: Garfield tricks Odie into thinking he's a cow./Roys agent get him a new job on the Buddy Bear's show./An angel tries to stop Garfield from being mean to Odie.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Garfield discovers a plot by washing machines to conquer the world. Roy opens a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: On the Case: Painful Memories
programme.desc: A young marine comes home and finds his nine month pregnant wife savagely beaten in their bedroom. Was he an innocent victim or could he have been responsible for the terrible crime.

programme.title: On the Case: Officer Down
programme.desc: A detective moonlighting at an Atlanta hotel is fatally wounded in a furious gun battle with two robbers. The case goes cold for more than 25 years, until an unusual call comes in from an unlikely informant.

programme.title: On the Case: As She Lay Dying
programme.desc: August 19th, 2014. It was a hot afternoon in Portland, Oregon when police received a distressing 911-call. A woman had been stabbed at an apartment complex. By the time first responders arrived, the victim had already lost too much blood to be saved.

programme.title: On the Case: A Fateful Decision
programme.desc: A Young mother is kidnapped out of her driveway after a birthday celebration... Did a string of good luck, lead to her disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: When Rhonda Boggs is discovered murdered in her own kitchen, police get an important lead from the only witness to the crime, Rhonda's two year old daughter.

programme.title: On the Case: A Call for Justice
programme.desc: After a man confesses to a terrible double homicide, police must determine whether he actually committed the crime.

programme.title: On the Case: It Won't End Well
programme.desc: A young woman's strange encounter with a man outside her home becomes the thread that unravels a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: On the Case: Almost Home
programme.desc: A young woman's battered body is found on the side of the road. The shocking evidence from the crime leads police down a trail of tragedy.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder in Room 205
programme.desc: A young woman's journey to a new life comes to a savage end in a roadside motel.

programme.title: On the Case: A Lifetime of Questions
programme.desc: When Sergeant David Brewer from the Carbon County Sheriff's Office met with an old high school friend named, Heidi Jones, he had no idea what she wanted to talk about. But the conversation would change his life forever.

programme.title: On the Case: Bound by the Truth
programme.desc: When a retired professor is found murdered, police must figure out whether the victim's son and daughter in law were eyewitnesses or the killers.

programme.title: On the Case: Final Words
programme.desc: A devoted mother returns home from work and finds her 17-year-old daughter has been murdered. Was her killer the mysterious boyfriend she had written about in her journal?

programme.title: On the Case: A Different Time
programme.desc: When Barbara Rowan left her house on an afternoon in 1984, she had a baseball mitt, a ball and a radio. Barbara claimed she was on her way to meet her coach. After she didn't return home, Police discovered that the teenager didn't play any sports.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer Among Friends
programme.desc: When a teenager is found savagely murdered, police must retrace her last steps alive to identify her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Father's Quest
programme.desc: After finding his beautiful 19 year old daughter dead, a father launches a relentless pursuit of her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Eyes of a Killer
programme.desc: Eyewitnesses helplessly watch as a 19-year-old clerk is abducted from a Del Ray Beach convenience store.

programme.title: On the Case: Ring of Truth
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is discovered high in the San Bernardino Mountains, detectives must figure out who she was and how she got there before they can catch the cold blooded killer who murdered her.

programme.title: On the Case: Unfinished Journey
programme.desc: Jamie Bowie disappears while driving from Phoenix to Los Angeles on Interstate 10, then her body is found near the highway a month later.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Fast-food workers in clown costumes chase the Sliders to a resort where Maggie (Kari Wuhrer) is traumatized by a sadistic, virtual reality Civil War game.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After being dumped in the middle of the Pacific ocean, the Sliders are rescued by a merchant ship populated by a band of pirates.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders must pull off the heist of a precious gem that they need to fix their malfunctioning timer.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders discover Los Angeles under a desert and Rembrandt (Cleavant Derricks) is worshipped as an ancient deity.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: An energy barrier threatens to consume everything in its path as the Sliders rush to prevent Mallory (Robert Floyd) from being transformed into their nemesis, Dr. Geiger (guest star Peter Jurasik).

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 1.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 2.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders race to find the cure for a deadly plague that is consuming the inhabitants of that dimension. Guest stars: Yee Jee Tso, James Bell. With Jerry O'Connell and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders must find a solution amid the chaos when they land on an Earth in jeopardy of being destroyed by a meteor. Guest stars Gerry Narin and Jason Gaffney. With Sabrina Lloyd.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Wade and Rembrandt (Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks) are treated as gods when the Sliders land on an Earth where free love and thinking still exists. Guest star: Jason Gaffney.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders land on an Earth where being intelligent is more popular than being a famous athlete. Guest stars William B. Davis, Karen Austin and Gabrielle Rose. With John Rhys-Davies.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The travelers slide to a world where Rembrandt "Crying Man" Brown is as huge as Elvis in our world, but after a mysterious "death" eight years ago, this world has had to make do with "Crying Man" impersonators.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders travel to a parallel dimension, which at first glance seems like paradise. Money is given to play the lottery, streets are quiet... it's life in the slow lane and very pleasant.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: On a world where males have been rendered impotent, females eager to repopulate greet the male Sliders as "love gods.''

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Trapped and separated from the other Sliders, Quinn finds himself on an astral plane where only a young girl named Gillian can see or hear him.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn is mistaken for a gunslinger in a world where the code of the Wild West still prevails.
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bad, and the Wealthy

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The vengeful and vicious El Sid follows the sliders to a world where San Francisco is a prison facility.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: A world that seems to mirror the previous world the Sliders encountered gives Wade the chance to prevent a series of murders.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn leaves the safety of a cave and faces a man-eating allosaurus in an attempt to retrieve the timer.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: The Doctor Is Dead
programme.desc: The beautiful, highly popular Dr Teresa Sievers was a rising social media star when she was found bludgeoned to death in her Bonita Springs, Florida kitchen. It was the third suspicious death of a holistic doctor in recent weeks in the area.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder Under A Blue Moon
programme.desc: Each episode of Murder Masterminds immerses viewers in the emotions and mystery of a homicide, using interviews, recreations and dramatic police dash/body cam videos to tell a tale of murder and deception.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In Wisconsin Field
programme.desc: When Nicole, a young teacher, was found shot to death in a Wisconsin farm field, police arrested her live-in boyfriend who had waited 18 hours to report her missing. But later, a stranger Nicole met at a concert in a local bar became a prime suspect.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: The Farmer's Wife
programme.desc: When Shirley Carter was found murdered in her farmhouse kitchen, her abusive husband Bill was considered a prime suspect. But her husband pointed the finger at someone else - his son Jason. It was up to the jury to decide who to believe.

programme.title: Killer Britain
programme.desc: A gangland feud brings years of murder and mayhem into an inner-city community. Journalist Dermot Murnaghan and detective Clive Driscoll delve into the shocking story of Mark Fellows, and the persistence and ingenuity that brought the feud to an end.

programme.title: Killer Britain
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan remembers the morning of 2 June 2010 when the news broke of a gunman on the loose in Cumbria, indiscriminately killing strangers. Along with former Met detective Clive Driscoll, Dermot looks back on the remarkable events of that day.

programme.title: Murdertown: Watford
programme.desc: In 2000, a young woman is stabbed to death while walking her dog in a picturesque park in the town. A suspect is seen running semi-naked across the M1 motorway. It takes detectives weeks to identify the killer as a local man called Leon Amos.

programme.title: Murdertown: Huddersfield
programme.desc: In 2014 a sex offender called Robert Hind goes missing from a bail hostel. Cops fear he’s absconded to commit crime. The town is scoured. But then the cops learn that the sex offender hasn’t absconded - he’s been murdered.

programme.title: Murdertown: Sunderland
programme.desc: Throughout the early '90s young boys would be found dead after sniffing glue and being trapped in derelict buildings which caught fire. Cops soon found they were actually being systematically murdered by a man called Steven Grieveson.

programme.title: Murdertown: Brighton
programme.desc: In 2015 a man visits a tarot card reader. Within an hour she’s dealt out the death card and he’s confessed to a murder. When cops arrive they discover he’s been living at home with his victim’s body for days.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Portsmouth: Ten-part true crime series with Katherine Kelly examining the UK's most shocking murders and the impact they've left on local communities. First up: Portsmouth.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Wrexham: Katherine Kelly explores how Jordan Davidson left an entire community in fear, when his series of increasingly violent crimes culminated in murder.

programme.title: Murdertown
programme.desc: Middlesbrough: Katherine Kelly examines Middlesbrough murderer Reginald Wilson, described by criminal psychologists as one of the most dangerous men ever to be assessed.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Murder Of Stephen Cameron
programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the fatal stabbing of 21-year-old motorist Stephen Cameron during a motorway altercation in 1996.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Garry Newlove
programme.desc: Garry Newlove’s wife Helen talks about the events on the night of his murder and the days afterwards, as well as her current work as a peer in the House of Lords combatting anti-social behaviour.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Sutcliffe
programme.desc: Arguably Britain's most infamous serial killer, Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire during the 1970s.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Christopher Foster
programme.desc: Failed businessman Christopher Foster killed his wife and daughter before burning their mansion in Shropshire to the ground in August 2008.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rose West
programme.desc: With her husband Fred, Rose West brutally murdered ten girls between 1973 and 1979, making her one of the most high profile serial killers in the UK.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Marchioness Disaster
programme.desc: The story of the Marchioness; a pleasure boat that collided with dredger Bowbelle and sank within minutes resulting in the loss of 51 lives.

programme.title: What On Earth: Episode 6
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Embark on an eye-opening journey as experts investigate the startling mysteries captured by satellites orbiting the Earth: from hidden worlds to unexplainable natural phenomena.

programme.title: What On Earth
