programme.title: Scorpion: Crime Every Mountain
programme.desc: As Cabe's trial looms over Team Scorpion, a simple case goes sideways when they help a father and his daughter whose plane crashes nearby.

programme.title: Scorpion: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)
programme.desc: As Team Scorpion anxiously awaits the verdict of Cabe's trial which could send him to prison, they focus their nervous energy on trying to save a dog stuck in a cistern.
programme.sub-title: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)

programme.title: Scorpion: A Christmas Car-Roll
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, when Walter chooses work over spending quality time with his friends, he falls down the stairs and hits his head, and as he lays unconscious, he enters a dream world where Team Scorpion never existed.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Bunker Games
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with Toby's nemesis, Quincy Berkstead and his wife, Amy , when they are locked inside an artificially intelligent doomsday bunker that aims to kill them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun
programme.desc: A solar storm knocks out power in Los Angeles, and Team Scorpion must help a teen pilot and his girlfriend who are lost over the Pacific without navigation or radio contact.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wave Goodbye
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must prevent an incoming tsunami from hitting a vulnerable nuclear power facility, and Toby secretly helps his ex-fiancée retrieve her stolen identity.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nerd, Wind and Fire
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Team Scorpion must set aside their romantic plans to help a doctor and pilot trapped inside a helicopter that crashed atop a skyscraper.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dumbster Fire
programme.desc: The geniuses of Team Scorpion turn into knuckleheads and Paige must simplify the science for them, when their mental faculties are impaired during a job to prevent the creation of a black hole.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dork Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Team Scorpion inadvertently crashes a bank robbery in progress and is taken hostage. Also, Sylvester's feelings for Florence grow.

programme.title: Scorpion: Gator Done
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to the bayou to track down a cagey alligator in order to stop a deadly mosquito-borne virus, and Paige teaches Walter the concept of the 'white lie.'

programme.title: Scorpion: Foul Balls
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must use their high IQs to win a softball game when the homeland director challenges, with all of their future government contracts on the line.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kenny and the Jet
programme.desc: Paige's maternal side goes into high gear when Team Scorpion must save an unconscious, a hypothermic boy stuck in the wheel well of their airborne airplane.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Lie in the Sand
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Northeast Africa where they must carefully navigate a minefield in order to save the lives of local villagers.

programme.title: Scorpion: Pilot
programme.desc: When a crisis at LAX leaves dozens of airplanes unable to land, the government enlists a team of misfit geniuses to save the day.

programme.title: Scorpion: Single Point of Failure
programme.desc: The Governor calls on Team Scorpion when his daughter is mysteriously "bio-hacked" with a deadly virus and has only 24 hours to live.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Cyclone
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is determined to prove their worth when a bomber threatens to take out the internet infrastructure of the entire Southwest.

programme.title: Scorpion: Shorthanded
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Las Vegas for a simple casino job, but a robbery leads to Walter's arrest and the rest of the team is left to clear his name.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plutonium Is Forever
programme.desc: To fix a Los Angeles nuclear reactor that's on the verge of a cataclysmic meltdown, Walter and the team must reluctantly enlist the help of a troubled former member.

programme.title: Scorpion: True Colors
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must pass a mandated psych evaluation or face being disbanded after they're accused of destroying a priceless work of art in an attempt to protect an art exhibit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Father's Day
programme.desc: A case gets personal for Team Scorpion when three convicts break out of prison and one of them is a brilliant hacker who was forced to help the others steal billions online.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Strongarm takes on her first “solo” mission—tracking the insane frog-like Decepticon SPRINGLOAD to the ruins of an ancient temple.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Adventures in Bumblebee-sitting!
programme.desc: The Bee Team welcomes visiting Autobot veteran JAZZ, just in time to fend off the massive Bot-worm PED – a petty crook bent on monopolizing Energon supplies.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Infected by a Decepticon’s toxin, Bumblebee regresses to the maturity of a youngster, leaving the team essentially leaderless, chasing an escaped fugitive, and trying to keep tabs on the hyperactive lieutenant.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Out of Focus
programme.desc: The Bee team finds itself caught in the middle of a feud between rival bounty hunters, who are both out to claim a bounty on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sideways
programme.desc: Bee tries to keep his team from distraction as they fight MALODOR and his Skunkticon posse, while Optimus, in the realm of the Primes, undergoes a dangerous test administered by MICRONUS.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Even Robots Have Nightmares
programme.desc: Sideswipe blackmails Strongarm into doing all his work while the team tries to capture crab-like CLAMPDOWN, jailed for the very same crime back on Cybertron, before he can join Steeljaw’s Pack.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Some Body, Any Body
programme.desc: Denny and the Bots are captured by the bat-Decepticon NIGHTSTRIKE, who plunges the team members into their worst fears.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: One of Our Mini-Cons Is Missing
programme.desc: Mad-scientist VERTEBREAK captures Sideswipe, steals his body and stores the Autobot’s head in a jar, leaving Sideswipe to think he’s unable to contribute to the team.
programme.sub-title: One of Our Mini-Cons Is Missing

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: After a dispute with his sensei, Drift, Jetstorm returns to Earth in the hopes of studying at the feet of a new master – Russell!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Champ
programme.desc: Bee and the Team head to the ocean floor to capture Decepticon OCTOPUNCH, not knowing that Grimlock is covering up a serious injury.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Trouble With Fixit
programme.desc: An attempt to fix the ailing Fixit goes horribly wrong, turning the Mini-Con into a fully weaponized and lethal prison guard who mistakes the Bee Team for Decepticon fugitives.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Lock Out
programme.desc: After Steeljaw and his Pack commandeer the Scrapyard and its defense while the Bee Team is away, our heroes must find a way back in – or face an army of freed Decepticon prisoners.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Similarly Different
programme.desc: When Dinobot Scowl goes on a rampage, Grimlock briefly ponders a return to old habits, but comes to terms with the fact that not all Dinobots are good-guys.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Buzz on Windblade
programme.desc: The Bee Team allies with Windblade, another Decepticon-hunting Autobot, to take on Zizza, a mind-controlling queen-bee-'Con who has taken control of a small airport.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Ghosts and Imposters
programme.desc: An educational trip turns into a Decepticon hunt as Bee and the Bots stumble upon the shape-shifter Pseudo in a western ghost town.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Battlegrounds Part 1
programme.desc: As Optimus prepares to return to Earth to face the mysterious Great Evil he's prophesied to Bumblebee, the Bee Team tries to prevent Steeljaw's Pack from teleporting that very threat, the First Decepticon, Megatronus, back into Earth's dimension.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Battlegrounds Part 2
programme.desc: Reunited with Optimus Prime, Bee, and his team must use everything they’ve learned together to stop Megatronus from annihilating Earth and Cybertron in one fell swoop.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Overloaded – Part 1
programme.desc: The Autobots split into two teams, one facing an old foe of Bumblebee's and the other a Decepticon in the polar wastes.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Overloaded – Part 2
programme.desc: With an old score to settle, Bumblebee insists on taking on OVERLOAD alone, while a weakened Optimus must learn to contribute in ways others than combat if his team is to bring down POLARCLAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Metal Meltdown
programme.desc: As Steeljaw learns of a community of Decepticons in a surprising location, Grimlock and Strongarm struggle to improve their teamwork as, together with Bumblebee, they face SABERHORN.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Suspended
programme.desc: After a mistake in the field, Strongarm takes herself out of action just when the team needs her most against fire-­‐starting Decepticons CRAZYBOLT and SLICEDICE.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Cover Me
programme.desc: Windblade's concern for Optimus' wellbeing may spell doom for the entire Away Team when they run up against a sly hunter of a Decepticon named RAZORPAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Brianpower
programme.desc: Grimlock forgets how to fight when, in an effort to become smarter, he downloads a huge amount of data into his brain and overwrites his combat instincts.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Misdirection
programme.desc: More hints about Decepticon Island are revealed when Steeljaw invades the Scrapyard with a clever plan, and Bumblebee, Grimlock and Strongarm confront SCORPONOK, one of the Island's leaders.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Bumblebee's Night Off
programme.desc: After being coaxed into going to a concert given by his favorite band, Bumblebee hopes for a quiet evening away from the Scrapyard, but finds action and danger when BISK attacks the arena.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Impounded
programme.desc: Grimlock's quest for an effective disguise goes into overdrive when QUILLFIRE returns and Bumblebee and Strongarm find themselves stuck in an impound lot.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Portals
programme.desc: Fixit's efforts to repair the GroundBridge go horribly awry, instead summoning two of the most legendary and fearsome Decepticons to the Scrapyard – and banishing Bumblebee to another dimension.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Graduation Exercises
programme.desc: Trying to show how effective they are without their teacher's direction, Slipstorm and Jetstorm inadvertently put Drift in harm's way and must come to their master's aid before he is destroyed by STOCKADE.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Decepticon Island, Part 1
programme.desc: With the Bee Team and the Away Team reunited, the Autobots, joined by an old friend, locate and investigate Decepticon Island, and unexpectedly find Steeljaw in charge of an army of Decepticons!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Decepticon Island, Part 2
programme.desc: Badly outnumbered and trapped on Decepticon Island, the Autobots desperately search for a way to take out Steeljaw and put his army of fugitives in stasis, but friction between Bumblebee and Optimus could put the mission – and all of Earth – at risk!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: History Lessons
programme.desc: Bumblebee's guided tour of Earth brings the Bee Team to Optimus Prime's old base, but Sideswipe doesn't have any use for history.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Strongarm's Big Score
programme.desc: When Strongarm surprisingly scores the lowest on a skills test created by Fixit, she's determined to improve her score.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Pretzel Logic
programme.desc: Not wanting the overaggressive Dinobot to compromise his team's quest to capture the scavenger Decepticons and their Mini-­‐Cons, Bee sends Grimlock on a “solo mission” to the Alps.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Mighty Big Trouble
programme.desc: The Scavengers find a most unexpected relic, even as their mysterious Mini-­‐Cons make their escape and their even more unexpected pursuer, Starscream, arrives on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Mini–Con Madness
programme.desc: Starscream gloats over his impending victory, unaware that Optimus Prime has arrived to help the remaining Autobots. After being surprised by, and taken over by, the Mini-­‐Cons, the heroes ally with the Mini-­‐Cons, who share their secrets with the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Worthy
programme.desc: Starscream tries to absorb the power of six of the Mini-­‐Cons, but needs the seventh to obtain the ultimate power he craves for his revenge.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: King of the Hill –Part 1
programme.desc: Bumblebee, still relaxing after the Autobots' triumph over Starscream, feels his team can tackle any issue that might come up.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: King of the Hill –Part 2
programme.desc: Bumblebee struggles to bring his out-of-practice team to combat readiness as they square off against the missiles and oil barrel traps of Stunticon Heat seeker.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Defrosted
programme.desc: Grimlock begs to learn new fighting methods from reluctant “teacher” Drift –but Grimlock's initial attempts to put Drift's lessons into action fall comically flat.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1995 in Beaumont, Texas, the parents of Catherine Edwards find her body in her bathroom. The killer evades justice, that is, until forensic science catches up with him.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After police identify a murder victim thanks to her butterfly necklace, they discover that several of her colleagues had vendettas against her.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Three Indiana construction workers are found shot on a work site.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A Texan who vows to live a reformed life after being released from prison is subsequently convicted of murder, despite insisting his innocence, so he uses forensic science from behind bars to try to prove his case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An extremely successful California career woman keeps falling ill and doctors can't determine why, then after she dies they still have no explanation until they find a key figure in her life has been lying about his past.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The body of a 24-year-old criminology student is found wrapped in a blanket alongside a desolate road in Brooklyn, N.Y.; police discover that the bouncer at a bar is her killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Will a new forensic science tool find the killer of Cathy Sposito, murdered on an Arizona hiking trail in 1987?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Susan Eads is found murdered in Texas in 1983. Decades later, can modern forensics finally find the perpetrator?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1986, Barbara Carr was killed in a home invasion, while her husband escaped. New science may finally unearth a suspect.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder in 1991, will determination and forensic tools find Danielle Clause's killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a 79-year-old woman is found shot to death in her home, investigators initially suspect her husband or a violent neighbour; shell casings recovered at the scene and a high-tech database reveal an unlikely killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young single mother is abducted from a gas station and later found stabbed to death near an oil field; detectives use shoe and tire impressions to weed out numerous suspects and find the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a 23-year-old Marine dies in his bedroom, doctors initially believe a heart attack is to blame; when arsenic is found in his organs, his wife is charged with murder; a sharp attorney and toxicological testing uncover the truth.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When an 18-year-old girl is abducted while talking on a pay phone, forensic evidence found on her clothing points police in the direction of a suspect who shockingly confesses that he didn't act alone.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In the story of a Los Angeles kidnapping, ransom and murder ring, retired scientists use sonar equipment to locate victims at the bottom of a reservoir.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's skeletal remains are found in Okaloosa County in 1994. It sparks a years-long search for her identity and killer, until a new forensic tool provides answers.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A young woman is found beaten to death in the snow of rural Wisconsin in 1984. The killer evades detection of the police for decades. How will a breakthrough in a DNA testing methods reveal the killers identity?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When mother Mary Davis is found murdered, the case spans decades. Bleeding edge forensics could hold the answers.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead from a gun-shot wound, police suspect her husband. However, forensic teams prove what really happened and the truth is stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A 70-year-old retired veteran is found dead on his boat after a bad sea storm; detectives discover he was killed during an attempted robbery after winning $400 in keno.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A Texas love triangle turns deadly, and it appears to be an open and shut case until technology tells the tale.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: July Fourth weekend leads to tragedy for a California family. To catch a killer, detectives utilise an unorthodox technique - analysing bug fragments - to help put a murderer behind bars.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A family mourns the unexpected death of a beloved grandmother at Christmas. While local police assure everyone that she was a victim of a tragic accident and that there is no foul play, some things about the scene just don't add up.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Serial rapes spur fear in a city in North Carolina. Years later new forensic science finds the perpetrator.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1993, the brutal murder of 15-year-old Melissa Lee shocked a Seattle suburb. The investigation proved fruitless. Thirty years later, the cold case was reopened. Will there be a breakthrough in the case?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: A woman in Texas is killed and dumped in an old basement. The hosts attempt to answer the question of whether new forensic tools are capable of finding the murderer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a true crime hobbyist connects a Utah Jane Doe to an Ohio missing persons case, detectives are hard-pressed to solve the decades-old murder.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Bitterroot
programme.desc: Opening day of big game season is busy for Montana's Game Wardens. Follow along as they patrol the Bitterroot game area. Plus, the wardens set up a sting to catch poachers, complete with a moving decoy.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation H2O
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Warm Springs
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Moonshine
programme.desc: Montana game wardens attempt to track down suspects of illegally killed animals. Plus, one wardens get the opportunity to take a break from enforcing hunting laws to actually go on a mule deer hunt for himself.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Alternative Ulster
programme.desc: We cross the Irish Sea and the stories take a more political turn. Specifically we explore the infiltration of drugs into Ireland, and the relationship between terrorists, politicians and organised crime.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Your Money or Your Life?
programme.desc: The 70s and 80s saw a change in activity for criminal fraternities. Following the sentencing of the Krays, many gangs turned to armed robbery. Villains saw the banks and armoured cars that transported huge amounts of cash as relatively easy pickings.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: London
programme.desc: With a history rich in criminal activity, England's capital gives Bernie the chance to meet numerous 'faces' that have shaped London's colourful past, as well as present day names.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Liverpool
programme.desc: The famous port's wealthy history has inextricably contributed to its prosperous underworld, wherein the likes of Charlie Seiga, Curtis Warren and Shaun Smith thrived.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Manchester
programme.desc: One of Manchester's most infamous gangs was “The Quality Street Gang”. The gang was well known for sending the Krays 'packing' from Manchester when the infamous brothers tried to expand their operation Northwards.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Birmingham
programme.desc: Examining the notorious Peaky Blinders, the flourishing gang culture in the sixties with links to the Krays, and how this culture continues today.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Cons to Icons
programme.desc: In the final episode, Bernard O'Mahoney explores the media’s influence on creating celebrities out of criminals. Is it possible to create a gangland persona based purely on false headlines? Yes, but there are certain to be consequences...

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Newcastle
programme.desc: Tyneside's gangland capital was immortalised in the Michael Caine film Get Carter, based on the life of Dennis Stafford. Bernie meets Stafford, who talks of Newcastle's past.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: My Generation
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney looks at the effect of time on gangs and their reputations. Whether it be organised motorcycle groups or Irish travellers, the roots are dying out with every new generation, but how does this affect the older, more traditional members?

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Big Horn
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered where confiscated trophy animals end up? Today we'll show you. Follow game wardens as they monitor hunting activity on big horn sheep. Flathead Lake is overflowing with holiday cheer during the 4th of July. Let's keep it safe.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Rogers Pass
programme.desc: Montana Game Warden Bryan Golie helps out when a hunter is injured while in the woods. Elsewhere, Wardens chase down hunters that don't stop at their check station; with surprising results.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Elk Dummy
programme.desc: Montana game wardens deploy elk decoys across the state in hopes of catching would-be poachers.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Wolf Creek
programme.desc: Wardens patrol the Wolf Creek area of Montana for illegal hunting activity. Elsewhere, Wardens conduct a mule deer decoy operation.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Grizzly Bear
programme.desc: This week, game wardens deal with a missing child who was last seen dragged off by a bear... good thing it's only a training excercise. Meanwhile it's opening season for shed antler hunters and the wardens have their hands full!

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Water Rescue
programme.desc: This week, a couple of wardens face off with early season anglers over gaming laws while other wardens get trained in open water rescue techniques.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart & Sparks
programme.desc: As 15 Division recovers from the shooting of Det. Luke Callaghan, a series of arsons culminates in the torching of a laundromat – and the rookies are forced to confront their own burning issues.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Stung
programme.desc: Using a local car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants. One of the criminals they capture tries to bargain for a lighter sentence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: In Plain View
programme.desc: When a police informant is found murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the notoriously brutal East Jameson gang. Andy has to work closely with Detective Jo Rosati, a woman who seems far too interested in Andy’s fiancé, Luke.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman gets brutally attacked in the same manner as deceased rookie cop Zoe Martinelli. Det. Luke Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine. Andy and Swarek work together to find the accomplice of a dyed blue bank robber

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together under Swarek’s expert tutelage in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident. While Andy deals with a woman pinned in her car, the other officers must track and apprehend the fugitive

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Little Faith
programme.desc: When Traci and Andy are sent out on an undercover training exercise, they stumble upon a young woman who is about to die of an overdose. Meanwhile, Dov finds himself on a “ride-along” with a drug dealer and old friend of his deceased brother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: On The Double
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer. Meanwhile, Swarek’s off the grid, trying to get information out of former crime enforcer Jamie Brennan

programme.title: Rookie Blue: God’s Good Grace
programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated by Jamie Brennan in the basement of a Pickering farmhouse, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a mysterious young girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy McNally connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.
programme.sub-title: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Class Dismissed
programme.desc: As local high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of an armed police car. While tracking down the stolen vehicle, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a volatile teen boy

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Good Shoot
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a young black teenager.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girl’s Night Out
programme.desc: On Traciʼs first day as a detective, all hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver. Jerry discovers that the driver of the parked car was dead before the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Messy Houses
programme.desc: While answering a domestic disturbance call, Andyʼs personal life is turned inside out when the social worker on the scene turns out to be her estranged mother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic - or, at the very least, a gifted conman - enters 15 Division to help find the missing witness in an organized-crime case, the officers are forced to come face-to-face with some of the hidden truths

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a grad-student-turned escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women. Since Gail fits the physical description of the victims, she is sent on an undercover sting at a high-end hotel

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Out Of Time
programme.desc: After the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator, the grim discovery of the body of a missing girl reopens an unsolved case – bringing back Detective Luke Callaghan in from the Homicide Squad to oversee it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are still reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues. When they discover that a laptop has been stolen containing sensitive information, they set out to tie up several of open cases

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary teenager (Lily Collins) discovers that she is descended from a line of half-angel warriors called Shadowhunters, who protect humanity from evil forces.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Legendary half-demon Hellboy encounters an ancient resurrected sorceress who's out to avenge a past betrayal. Caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy becomes hell-bent on stopping her without triggering the end of the world.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: A group of high-school students, who are infused with unique superpowers, harness their abilities in order to save the world.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: A 13-year-old clairvoyant (Dakota Fanning) and the son (Chris Evans) of a murdered assassin join forces against a covert government agency that dabbles in psychic drugs and warfare.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The fate of the human race hangs in the balance when the Witch Queen (Julie Engelbrecht) rises from the dead, seeking revenge against Kaulder (Vin Diesel), the immortal warrior who slayed her centuries ago.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Legendary half-demon Hellboy encounters an ancient resurrected sorceress who's out to avenge a past betrayal. Caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy becomes hell-bent on stopping her without triggering the end of the world.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: A 13-year-old clairvoyant (Dakota Fanning) and the son (Chris Evans) of a murdered assassin join forces against a covert government agency that dabbles in psychic drugs and warfare.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: A group of high-school students, who are infused with unique superpowers, harness their abilities in order to save the world.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Everyone who steals a statue that represents the Egyptian cat-goddess Mafdet is killed. Now, the statue has disappeared and Sidney and Nigel are tasked with retrieving it.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Book of Love
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Milan, Italy to search for Casanova's lost Book of Love.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Myth of the Maze
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Claudia visit Athens, Greece to search the Minotaur's maze for the legendary golden twine.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Afterlife and Death
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Cairo, Egypt and then Amsterdam. They must beat rival relic hunter Avery Ko to the Pharaoh Thutmose's diamond before it is cut up and sold.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Etched in Stone
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and Stewie Harper head to Stockholm, Sweden to find the Runestone of King Jann I of Norway.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Accompanying Max the magician, Sydney and Nigel journey to Atlantic City, New Jersey in search of Hungary's lost and allegedly cursed Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to France to look for the lost wedding vows of Josephine Pontoise and Guy de Bourdin, which would prove their heir is the rightful owner of St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to France to find the lost stones from Marie Antoinette's Crown.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nothing But the Truth
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are reunited with Stewie Harper in the search for the Chalice of Truth in France.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Paris, France after the Sword of Jacques de Molay, Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Rival relic hunter Rita Rosellini is also after the sword.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Possessed
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Brussels, Belgium in search of the sacred sundial of Zeus in order to stop the Vampires.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Memories of Montmartre
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Paris, France to find a stolen locket, so they can clear Sydney's dead grandmother of the charges.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Put Back
programme.desc: Kuba, Africa 100 AD: Worshippers of Woote curse his idol to protect it. 2000: Ross Crawford comes to Sydney, because he took the idol and the curse has accelerated his aging.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Legend of the Lost
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel set out to find if the legend of the lost civilization in New Guinea is actually true. Unfortunately, they have to team up with Derek Lloyd.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Dagger of Death
programme.desc: India, 500 A.D.: A precious dagger is used in human sacrifices to goddess Kali. Sydney must return a relic to India for her fellow hunter, who believes the dagger made him kill his assistant.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Last of the Mochicas
programme.desc: On a search for a South American Mochica Indian relic of protection, Nigel and his colleagues get captured by local guerrillas. It's up to Sydney and ally Jason Clark to save them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fertile Ground
programme.desc: Sydney reunites with her high school sweetheart to track down a Hawaiian fertility idol in Madagascar.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Gypsy Jigsaw
programme.desc: Sydney receives a deck of rare Tarot cards from her recently deceased friend. The infamous, previously unmentioned Vulture was after him. Sydney enlists Claudia to help.

programme.title: Ancient Engineers: Aliens On Earth
programme.desc: Our evolution may be influenced by our ancestors and their Gods. We are not alone in the universe.

programme.title: Deep Sea Aliens
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries of the deep sea: underwater anomalies, alien abductions, USOs, and unexplained cases that defy our understanding.

programme.title: UFO Hunters II: Tales from the universe
programme.desc: Italian ufologists explore alien evidence in history & folklore. Have we been watched since ancient times?

programme.title: Alien Cyclops: The Extraordinary Case of Sagrada Familia
programme.desc: In 1963 Brazil, three children witness a UFO in their backyard. An alien cyclops descends, and Mr. Alberto investigates the phenomenon.

programme.title: Alien Contact: UFO Invaders
programme.desc: Hundreds of UFOs have crashed on Earth. Mankind has witnessed these crashes, communicated with the visitors, even left our planet with them once they are able to return to their worlds, but the most shocking revelation is the reason why they come.

programme.title: Alien Paranormal: Bigfoot, UFOs and the Men in Black
programme.desc: Are Bigfoot creatures traveling to earth in UFO's, and being covered-up by Men in Black? Experience terrifying, real events as documented by top authorities, including: Aliens attacking a house; Alien Abductions to create a hybrid race; vortexes and more!

programme.title: Hopkinsville: The Alien Goblins
programme.desc: A family fights off goblin-aliens in a mysterious encounter, sparking debates and investigations. Fear drives their actions.

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: The Hidden Truth
programme.desc: This documentary charts the US government's involvement with UFO phenomenon from 1947 to the present day. Featuring rare classified footage, expert interviews, cover-ups and the revelation of a secret 20 million dollar UFO research program.

programme.title: From the Mothman to the Reptilians: A guide to alien species
programme.desc: Witnesses from around the world have had close encounters with extraterrestrial races, shaping our imagination and becoming cultural phenomena.

programme.title: Cover Ups Conspiracy : The Chinese Spy Baloon
programme.desc: Objects shot down in US/Canada airspace. Pentagon feigns ignorance. Alien involvement?

programme.title: Alien Crash at Roswell
programme.desc: The most enigmatic UFO incident in history exposed. Join Philip Coppens, star of History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series in this and unprecedented expose on the Roswell Incident revealing that there is much more to this case than previously believed.

programme.title: A Field Full of Secrets
programme.desc: In 2008, two best friends stepped into their very first crop circle in southern England. This is story of what happened next.

programme.title: Ancient Alien America
programme.desc: Native cultures have handed down shocking accounts for generations of Aliens from other worlds visiting Earth in the ancient past and their involvement with them.

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Fixers are putting bad tatts to bed in the sunny Med. Jay is taking on Tom the Titty Whacker, Alice helps out Catherine a Cher impersonator with a awful orchid and Sketch destroys a Alex's bad boxing tat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 5
programme.desc: The Tattoo fixers take on Mother-loving Ryan, Carly's puckered up revenge tat and Scots silly holiday slogan. Meanwhile Girls on tour Sam & Ellie, Paralympian Jess and Tattoo fanatic Liam all head to the parlour for some ink action.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 2
programme.desc: Jay is taking on best mates Sam and Laura's cheeky stickmen, Sketch is helping out Aaron with a lads holiday regret and spontaneous Danny's Magaluf mistake is Wrecked'tified.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Tattoo Fixers are back, and this time they've headed to the scene of the crime to cover awful art...the summer holiday! Ian needs help to cover his Magaluf monstrosity and Jay gives Callum a portrait to remember.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 4
programme.desc: At the parlour in the sun, Glen meets drunk tattoo collector Jack. Sketch rids Dylan of a reminder of his past & Jay gives Julie a portrait she can cherish forever.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch hides a Kardashian catastrophe, Alice gives Lana's emoji a facelift, and Jay is moved by a family's story of bravery.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tattoo Fixers on Holidays is back and this week new arrival Glen banishes bad boy Ashley's Magaluf moto, Sketch helps Bobby get rid of his rank rabbit, Alice gives Rachel a sentimental design, and Jay strips Clair of an awful ex tat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 8
programme.desc: Jay conjures up an Amy Winehouse masterpiece, Alice crafts an amazing geometric wolf and sketch creates matching tattoos for Amy and Chantelle. Also looking for tattoo therapy is Wonky-eyed Shannon, gambling man James and Tat mad Dan.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 7
programme.desc: The Fixers holiday hijinks continue, and this week Glen rids Mandy of her rabbits, Jay pulls off the perfect portrait and Alice gets her teeth into Helen's cupcake.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay saves Luke's bacon with a polished portrait. Sketch beautifies Mark's belly Buddha.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Belieber Nathan decides it's time for Sketch to rid him of his embarrassing fan tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Glen devours Harri's fast food foul-up, while Sketch knocks out boxer Russell's tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jay gives Leuan a tribute to his late sister, while Sketch evicts the eye on Mike's thigh.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: Our artists make Nicole's bum look less laddy, save teacher loving George from detention, and stop Joanne getting spanked. Distraction desiring Reece, Turkish offender John and gardening lover James also get an inkjection.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Jay covers paramedic Anthony's tattoo, which is putting the frighteners on his patients. Alice disguises Sonny's unwanted present from his mates. Sketch tackles Alex's drunken DIY teddy bear design.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Lou helps tomboy Lucy, who has a vulgar phrase tattooed on her leg. Skater boy Matt shows Sketch a tattoo in an unsightly place. Jay assists Amina, who thinks getting inked is worse than giving birth.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: Sketch and Jay double team Luke's bum art, Alice eases Katie's period pain, Glen puts a snowman on ice while Sketch tattoos a butcher who minced his arm off.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek encourages the team to buy a Francis Barnett Plover at auction. Plus, the wheels come off the restoration of an MG Metro.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek thinks a 29,000-mile Ford Capri should be kept original. Plus, a Hercules women's racing bike from the '50s.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek picks out a solid-looking 1969 MGB for the team to consider purchasing at a Mathewsons classic car auction. After winning it, the car is sent to a father-and-son team for restoration.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Dave alerts the team to a 1979 Lotus Esprit S3. The car is a thoroughbred classic that desperately needs a proper restoration, but it's also an expensive purchase that risks not paying off.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The Restoring Classics team pays tribute to mid-80s Midlands by breathing new life into what was once the fastest production MG ever made: the Montego Turbo.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A sun-bleached red Vauxhall Astra GTE gives the team a serious headache. In addition, they also buy an old French moped and catch up on the restoration of a barn find Mini Cooper S.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team gamble on restoring a Vanden Plas saloon from the 1970s and a child's tricycle from the 1960s. Plus, catch up on the restoration of a rare Sunbeam Lotus.

programme.desc: The story of a double-homicide and how dedicated police work, alongside forensics, solved the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The tragic murder of Brenda Dupont went unsolved for 28 years until the determined officers involved in the case brought the perpetrator to justice using advanced forensic techniques.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The senseless and cruel murder of Florida waitress Denise O'Neill was eventually solved, following comprehensive forensics and shrewd detective work which saw her killers brought to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the violent murder of Dr John Yelenic, and how the investigation into his death became one of the most infamous and shocking in Pennsylvania state history.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Exploring some of the most startling criminal cases of the past two decades where technology has changed the course of the investigations.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Joan Giambra was murdered, DNA technology and dogged police work linked the case to a string of other murders, helping to solve the crime and rectify a miscarriage of justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park: It's Christmas In Canada
programme.desc: It's Christmas In Canada: A law is passed in Canada, meaning poor lil' Ike must return to his biological parents. The boys set out to stop this but who is the evil mastermind behind the law? (S7, E15)

programme.title: South Park: Good Times with Weapons
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Hotter Than Summer: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: AWESOM-O: When Cartman disguises himself as a robot in order to play a prank on Butters, he ends up being used by movie execs to come up with film ideas and captured by the military! (S8, E05)

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Goobacks
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The Jeffersons: A new family arrive in South Park with a little boy called Blanket, a fairground in the garden and a dad with a penchant for singing and cosmetic surgery. Guess who? Shamone! (S8, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Douche and Turd
programme.desc: Douche and Turd: The pupils of South Park Elementary are called to vote for a new mascot. With the choices being a "giant douche" and a "turd sandwich" is there any point? (S8, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Something Wall-Mart This Way Comes
programme.desc: Something Wall-Mart This Way Comes: When a mall is built in South Park, the townsfolk become addicted to shopping - it'll take the boys hunting down its evil "heart" to end their misery! (S8, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Preschool
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Incredible Gift
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Woodland Critter Christmas
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Die Hippie, Die
programme.desc: Die Hippie, Die: Cartman runs a 'pest control' service to rid the town of hippies and is soon arrested, but when a plague of hippies invades South Park the town turn to him and his methods. (S9, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: Wing: The boys become talent agents to make an easy buck. They take on a Chinese lady named Wing and are soon confronted by the Chinese mafia, looking for a slice of the action. Fight! (S9, E03)

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Winner robots from rounds one through five battle it out in the arena, a wild card from the runners up throws a spanner in the works as it tries to overthrow attempts at glory.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A new spinner has something to prove and a family team pour blood, sweat and tears into keeping their robot wars dream alive. The robots compete through brutal group battles and fierce head to heads for a place in the heat final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The challenge for competitors is even tougher as the infamous House Robots have been let off the leash in a new twist. This is the second heat, and only one of the eight teams can go through to the series grand final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Four teams progress into a mini league going head to head in a bid for points. The top two teams will face each other in the heat final for the chance to secure their place in this series' grand final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This fourth heat is an explosive display of spinners as old favourites take on new hopefuls. They must dodge the arena hazards and the menacing new twist as house robots are unleashed to attack competitors and inflict maximum damage.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The reigning champions Apollo mount their defence of the title. They face stiff competition from Ms Nightshade, Coyote, Rusty, Crackers'N'Smash, Meggamouse, Trolley Rage and Carbide.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: It is the grand final and the teams must dodge the arena hazards and, in a menacing new twist, they can also hit the Arena Tyre to unleash the dreaded House Robots, allowing them to inflict maximum damage anywhere in the arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat F of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Ron and Panic Attack teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The undercover secrets and un-muzzled action of `Robot Wars', see how competitors prepare their robots for victory, or defeat.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat H of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Sting, Loco and Wizard teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage of Heat I of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the King Buxton and All Torque teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Another visit behind the scenes of `Robot Wars' series 2, more exclusive footage as access to the pits shows every nook and cranny of the week's competitors.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One competitor achieves every flipper robot's dream in this episode's heats, rapidly ending the first round. Another robot refuses to go into the pit alone and takes down whoever they can get grip on.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One competitor gets chopped up by competitor and house robot alike and a quick eviction from the arena makes the judge's job a simple one. A seemingly one-sided fight takes a different direction, thanks to the hazardous arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: When the competitor's weapons aren't quite doing the job, they must resort to using the arena to secure the win. There's not enough room for the both of them, which robot from the Isle of Sheppey will prove itself the best in this chance encounter.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: World Champions meet a newcomer in this episode's heat. One uneventful round leaves the house robots responsible for entertaining the crowd.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Matilda breaks the rules and strays from her zone, inflicting massive damage on unsuspecting robots, much to the dismay of the judges.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The semi-finals are here and the competitors step up a notch, even the house robots need to be cautious. One of the three losers of the first rounds have an opportunity for redemption in the Losers Melee.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: After this episode, the Grand Final lineup will be decided. With pressure mounting the robots are going all out. One competitor is sent to the clouds with the help of another. The house robots help decide who makes it to through.

programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Unearthed
programme.desc: In the small town of Garden Grove, Iowa, Jennifer and Norman Rice with their son Andrew, purchase a majestic 19th century mansion. Soon after, Jennifer and Andrew begin experiencing paranormal activity while Norman is out of town on business.

programme.title: A Haunting: Stalked by Evil
programme.desc: A shadowy presence manifests from the darkened corners of Judy McCarthy’s Texas home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting Of Allen House
programme.desc: Professor Mark Spencer and his wife Rebecca have just purchased the historic Allen House in Arkansas. Shortly after moving in, Rebecca comes face to face with a faceless spirit. Mark calls investigators to determine if the spirit means them harm.

programme.title: A Haunting: Immortal Love
programme.desc: Shortly after Whitney's family moving into their first home, a restless spirit shatters the serenity of their suburban life. Whitney calls in a paranormal team who uncover the truth behind the spirit's tragic death and his intense obsession with Whitney.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hell House
programme.desc: Bonnie and her family buy a farmhouse and they sense that they are being watched.

programme.title: A Haunting: Masks Of Terror
programme.desc: Jeanette Osborne treats herself to a set of Haitian masks to decorate her California dream home. But shortly after, strange activity leads her to conclude that the masks are to blame.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Possessed
programme.desc: Mary Vogel, a spiritual counselor for ten years, has a run in with a demonic force.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Attic
programme.desc: A series of photographs show what you cannot see with the naked eye: an evil face in the attic.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Fury
programme.desc: Shortly after Alicia and Scott Cain move into a farmhouse in the quiet Ohio countryside, they learn their home was the site of a brutal murder decades earlier. Plagued by the ghosts of this horrific event, they call in the Fourman Brothers to investigate.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Calling
programme.desc: Rebecca hears spirits but is able to ignore them until one emerges who refuses to be ignored.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Lake Club Horror
programme.desc: The Lake Club is transformed into a rock n roll nightclub with mysterious happenings.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: Carl, Keith and Cynthia Johnson begin using a spirit board, to communicate with the spirit haunting their home. But when their sister, Cynthia, is attacked both boys realize they are in over their heads and reach out to a paranormal investigator for help.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Awakening
programme.desc: Marcy’s son is deployed with the Army. Overcome with worry, a dormant spirits threatens her.

programme.title: A Haunting: Norman the Doll
programme.desc: Paranormal investigator, Stephen Lancaster, doesn’t believe in haunted objects until he captures proof the doll he recently acquired is haunted. Fearing he is in over his head, he attempts to get rid of it, but the doll has other plans.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Inferno
programme.desc: Kim and Craig move into their dream home in rural Bagley, Iowa with Kim’s two young daughters. When an unseen entity attacks the family, Kim and Craig realize they could be dealing with a ghost. They turn to a demonologist to help them reclaim the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Exorcism Of Cindy Sauer
programme.desc: Georgia single mother Cindy Sauer is finally getting back on her feet after the sudden death of her husband. But as she is recovering from her loss, nightmares and dark shadows haunt the family and mark the beginning of something far worse.

programme.title: Celebrity Eggheads
programme.desc: Can a team of authors, poets and illustrators featuring Clare Mackintosh, Nick Sharratt, Caleb Femi, actor and author George Costigan and novelist Wendy Holden triumph over the general knowledge goliaths and win the cash prize for their charity?

programme.title: Celebrity Eggheads
programme.desc: Can a team from `Celebrity Island with Bear Grylls' featuring Zoe Salmon, Dr Sara Kayat, Shazia Mirza, Iwan Thomas and Mark Jenkins triumph over the general knowledge goliaths and win the cash prize for their charity?

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: The Eggheads team are made up of some of Britain's top quizzers. They face a team of challengers trying to beat the incumbents in order to win a cash prize. If the Eggheads beat the challengers, the cash prize is rolled over to subsequent episodes.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Cinema entrepreneur Peter Moore brutally murdered four men in Wales in 1995.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Was the heinous serial killer Herbert William Mullin driven by nature or nurture? Featuring a unique interview with the murderer himself.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A look at the life and terrible crimes of Gary Ridgway. One of the US's most prolific serial killers, he had cops baffled for 20 years and killed so many women he lost count of his victims.
programme.sub-title: Gary Ridgway: The Green River Killer

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Examining the `Killer Clown', who raped, tortured and murdered more than 30 young men, burying the majority in his basement.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In late 1976 and early 1977, female students at the University of California were terrorised by a grim series of lookalike murders. Acting out a sick fantasy, Thor Christiansen struck while they were hitchhiking.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The concluding episode in this investigative series profiles Ivan Milat, the murderer of numerous backpackers in Australia in the 1990s. What led him to kill?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Documentary profile of Patrick Mackay, once dubbed the most dangerous man in Britain. In the mid 1970s, London and the south east was gripped by a series of bizarre murders.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: After being convicted of attempted murder and kidnapping, David Carpenter went on to kill five women.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Ex-marine Cleophus Prince Jr raped and murdered six women in 1990.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Charles Albright is suspected to have brutally murdered three women in Dallas' red light district.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: An insight into Britain's most infamous female serial killer, Myra Hindley. Did something cause her to commit her crimes, or was she born to kill?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The detectives, attorneys and psychiatrists who tried to unravel the mystery of why so many young people fell under Manson's spell, and how he was able to convince them to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Are serial killers born with the tendency to commit their crimes, or is it learnt? Under the microscope is American Jeffrey Dahmer.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and experts in the field seek clues as to what prompted the awful crimes carried out by Beverley Allitt.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The crimes of Ted Bundy, who is believed to have sexually assaulted and bludgeoned to death up to 100 young women in the USA in the 1970s.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Manchester murderer, Trevor Hardy, took the lives of three teenage girls in the 1970s.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The testimony of Dennis Rader, the killer who shocked the peaceful Mid-West folk of Wichita.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Gripping documentary examining the vicious crimes of Charles Starkweather, an American spree killer who murdered 11 people in the late 50s during a deadly road trip with his young lover.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1989, Allan Legere went on a brutal crime spree in Canada, committing assault, rape, arson and murder.

programme.title: House of Secrets
programme.desc: The Paris Police recruit the officer of an English ship to help trap counterfeiters by joining them.

programme.title: The Birthday Present
programme.desc: A British executive lands in prison after trying to smuggle a watch across the German border.

programme.title: Went the Day Well?
programme.desc: A small English village is so cut off that the arrival of a car is an event. When lorryloads of Royal Engineers led by Major Ortler turn up, the villagers have no reason to suspect that they are really disguised German paratroopers.

programme.title: Carve Her Name With Pride
programme.desc: The valiant World War II French resistance fighter Violette Szabo sacrifices everything for her cause.

programme.title: A Challenge for Robin Hood
programme.desc: Robin and his Merry Men set out to dethrone a self-appointed dictator who has seized power over the commoners.

programme.title: Dangerous Exile
programme.desc: A French duke saves Louis XVI's son during the Reign of Terror and hides him with a woman in Wales.

programme.title: Conspiracy of Hearts
programme.desc: A group of nuns at a convent during World War II help Jewish children escape from a Nazi transit camp.

programme.title: Caesar and Cleopatra
programme.desc: The Roman conqueror Julius Caesar takes over the Egyptian city of Alexandria, and inherits a problem: Cleopatra and her brother are to rule the country together, so Caesar takes Cleopatra under his wing, mentoring her in the uses of political power.

programme.title: Hamlet
programme.desc: Hamlet, Prince of Denmark, is in mourning for his dead father, the king. He's also disturbed by how quickly his mother, Gertrude, has remarried.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman
programme.desc: The ill-fated romance of Horatio Lord Nelson and Emma Hamilton, wife of the British Ambassador to Naples. Made during WWII, the film was clearly meant to raise the morale of British audiences and was said to have been Churchill's favourite film.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Dashawn and his mom claim that it was only a one-time fling with Monica and he can’t be the father of her child! Then, party girl April wants to find out who fathered her baby! Later, is Frederick or Jason the father of Marietta’s baby?
programme.sub-title: Is Your Best Friend Fred the Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: These dads are here to prove that they’re not the father. But these moms are not about to let them get away without taking responsibility for the child they helped bring into this world!
programme.sub-title: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Is Cortney the father of Brittany’s kids? According to his sister, Brittany cheated with her fiancé Clifton! Later, Melissa claims that her ex-husband didn’t father her twins and Sean’s the dad! Will the DNA results confirm this?
programme.sub-title: Did My Husband Father the Twins?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 4 Women… 4 Babies… Is He the Father?
programme.desc: We have more of the paternity pandemonium that you crave! You’ll see denying dads, mad moms and some of the most shocking results we’ve ever seen! Don’t miss one second of the drama on today’s MAURY!
programme.sub-title: 4 Women… 4 Babies… Is He the Father?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Beware! Hidden Dangers Caught on Tape
programme.desc: On this special edition of The Maury Show, Maury brings celebrity guests to the stage to share some of the most intense and shocking real-life footage ever caught on tape.
programme.sub-title: Beware! Hidden Dangers Caught on Tape

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Blaming Victoria for the demise of her relationship with a man, Asia is on a mission to make Victoria's life miserable; Troy fears that his fiancée, who cheated online in the past, is still having a relationship behind his back.
programme.sub-title: Our Entire Friendship Is A Lie / Unlock The Phone: You Got Caught!

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On Karamo, Imani and her child's father, took part in a threesome with another woman. But he started seeing that woman behind her back. Next, Zy'Tajia was willing to pay for her boyfriend Larone's cell phone bill, but found risky texts on his phone.
programme.sub-title: You Got My Bff Pregnant! / Unlock: You Lie and Bully Me

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Much to Malaysia's dismay, her boyfriend routinely talks to other women on social media. Then, Keiana is constantly fighting with her boyfriend about his cheating ways. He admits to his cheating ways in the past but claims he's an all true man now.
programme.sub-title: Unlock: My Man And Bestie Together? / Unlock: "Nothing Worth Coming Home For"

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Neshay tries to sort out a complicated DNA puzzle with a man named Michael. At first, Neshay thought Michael was her cousin, but it turns out that he could possibly be her father. Karamo tries to end the 29-year-old riddle.
programme.sub-title: DNA Mystery: Are You My Cousin Or My Father

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Malika says that her mother, Michelle, has a habit of spreading rumors and lies about the family on social media.
programme.sub-title: Help...My Mom Is Out Of Control

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Jennifer is accusing Michelle of causing the car crash and is suing her for the damages to her car.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Arthur is suing his ex-fiancé for the price of her engagement ring after she refused to return it.
programme.sub-title: You Had A Wife, A Fiance, And A Mistress?

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: After Billie's puppy died 6 days after purchase, she demands the seller reimburse her for vet bills, pain and suffering.
programme.sub-title: You Sold Me A Sick Puppy!

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Nicole is suing the man she rented a room from after making her uncomfortable and changing the locks after a fight.

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Joann says she hired the defendant as a handyman, and he did half the work then disappeared.

programme.title: The Maury Show: This Test Will Tell…Do I really Have 10 Kids?
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé Deon get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, William believes that his 2 of his 6 kids with ex-wife Nicole aren’t his and could be the father of another’s woman’s kid! Our DNA tests reveal the truth!
programme.sub-title: This Test Will Tell…Do I really Have 10 Kids?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'm Back for My 3rd Test... I'll Prove I'm Not the Father Again
programme.desc: Chris cheated and impregnated Lakin's neighbor. He denies he fathered Lakin’s baby. Then, John’s back for a 3rd DNA test. Can Jade prove that he’s the father or is her record 0-3?
programme.sub-title: I'm Back for My 3rd Test... I'll Prove I'm Not the Father Again

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Man Sleeping With My Teen Nephew?
programme.desc: Paul confesses three secrets to his girlfriend Alycia. Is Brandi's husband still having sex with Ashley after their threesome? Plus, Tim’s fidelity status could ruin his chances of marrying Laurie!
programme.sub-title: Is My Man Sleeping With My Teen Nephew?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Prom Date My Baby's Father?
programme.desc: After Maury opens the envelope and reveals the truth, will these mothers finally get the answers they seek or will they continue their searches?
programme.sub-title: Is My Prom Date My Baby's Father?

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Texted Nude Photos, Cheater!
programme.desc: After months of begging and pleading, Latoya forgave Justice for cheating. But now they’re back to test him for the same thing! Then, James could be too good to be true – is he cheating on Santa? What will the lie detector tests say?

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Cheated … Your 3 Kids Aren't His!
programme.desc: Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki’s boyfriend Tavon is a cheater. What will they say when he is caught on our hidden camera? Then, are James’ kids with Nikkie actually his?
programme.sub-title: You Cheated … Your 3 Kids Aren't His!
