programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A team rescues an overturned mixer full of cement. A driver faces hydraulic problems.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: A lorry fire poses endless problems for recovery, with burning ash complicating matters.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: A tipped-over shipment of A4 paper ends up being a tough task to take on.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A crew trying to take care of a burned-out trailer struggles due to its missing wheels.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Three veteran recovery experts struggle with a terribly trashed truck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Alpha Recovery join the team, tackling a 45-tonne crane that's become a pain.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: Kev tackles a big bin lorry, and Aidan has a brush with a bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: After a lorry rolls over under power lines, making a race for time.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: A 50 ton construction machine and the 20 ton trailer carrying it land in a stream.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: A 50-ton construction machine is stranded by a severely-damaged Victorian bridge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: A recovery crew work to rescue an articulated lorry that fell down a 20-metre embankment.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Sean tackles a telehandler that has flipped over in the back of a very muddy garden.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: On the M25 near Enfield two lorries, two cars and a van have piled into each other.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: A 40-tonne lorry careers off the M1 and plunges down an embankment into a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: On the M11, a loaded truck is marooned after a rear axle collapsed while at full speed.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: In Northumberland, a 32-tonne tipper gets lost in the dark and ends up stuck in a field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Kevin is called to a challenging recovery: a 75-tonne crane stranded in the countryside.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Vehicles in need of recovery include a Land Rover Discovery dumped in a canal.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: Just outside Newcastle, Kev is sent to rescue a wheelie bin delivery truck that is stuck.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance, as does Zuko's.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Poor Little Rich Turtle
programme.desc: Desperate for the formula to Shellhammer Chemical's super rocket fuel, Krang and Shredder send Rocksteady and Bebop to kidnap poor little rich brat Buffy Shellhammer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): What's Michelangelo Good For?
programme.desc: Dr. Lesseau is stealing animals from the city zoo to use for experiments.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Dimension X Story
programme.desc: April and Vernon of Channel Six News each need a big story, and Shredder's challenge to the Turtles of a fight to the finish sounds like just the ticket.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Degree
programme.desc: To pick up a correspondence course degree addressed to "Miss Donna Tello," Donatello talks Irma into playing genius-for-a-day.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Cufflink Caper
programme.desc: When Shredder hires gonzo gangster Big Louie to find the explosive Cufflinks of Cathay, the Turtles go undercover with the mob to get to the bottom of the plot. Gunfights galore lead to a final shootout at the taffy factory at high midnight.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Versus Tempestra
programme.desc: Tempestra's Revenge, the toughest game in video arcade, has got Leonardo hooked. Just as he's finally about to beat the machine, lightening strikes, and an electrical overload brings the wicked Tempestra to life.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter Vanishes!
programme.desc: First Master Splinter vanishes, leaving behind instructions that the Ninja Turtles must now disband and go their separate ways.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael Drives Em' Wild
programme.desc: Raphael's brain inadvertently gets switched with that of Oscar the cab driver.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beyond the Donatello Nebula
programme.desc: Donatello's efforts to contact life in the Turtle Nebula succeed only too well: he accidently transports a space-traveling lizard named Algy down to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Big Bug Blunder
programme.desc: After Bebop and Rocksteady ruin an experimental batch of mutagen, Krang discovers that this new goo grows giant-sized insects. Shredder immediately sends some of the humongous bugs to Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Foot Soldiers are Revolting
programme.desc: Desperate for decent henchmen, Shredder decides to make some minions he can rely on, and uses Krang's brain wave enhancer on a robotic foot soldier.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Unidentified Flying Leonardo
programme.desc: Investigating reports of UFOs in the country town of High Falls, April uncovers a real scheme.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Turtles and the Hare
programme.desc: In Krang's latest scheme, Rocksteady and Bebop, dressed as Easter bunnies, are blasting people with a Docilizer Ray and turning them into timid, rabbit-like people.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Once Upon a Time Machine
programme.desc: Hokum Hare discovers that Shredder has a time train to travel to the future, where he can become crimelord of a crime-free era.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Mondo Gecko
programme.desc: Michelangelo is turtle-napped by mutant lizard Mondo Gecko, who was mutated at the same time and place as the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Mutagen Man
programme.desc: Krang plans to use a large rocket's vapour trail to rain mutagen over the city when nerdy delivery boy Seymour Guts falls into Shredder's mutagen vat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Badd Time
programme.desc: Hillybilly crooks Bedelia Badd and sons Bufrod and Bubbaheist the Turtles new improved van, using it to steal the diamond in Dr. Kepple's Powercizer, which drains the city's power and could destroy it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman - Again!
programme.desc: The Swatter threatens to destroy the city with a stolen swarm of super termites unless the Turtles meet him atop The Entire State Building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Muckman Messes Up!
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop after new mutagen Compound X-7, which Krang thinks will un-mutate Turtles. At lab, garbagemen are doused with the stuff and change into mutants Muckman and Joe Eyeball, blaming Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps
programme.desc: Krang uses Big Louie to steal anti-freeze to try to start the Technodrome, now stuck in the Arctic. Shredder zaps Turtle pal Napoleon Bullfrog, with mutagen, who mutates into a giant monster and escapes into the city.
programme.sub-title: Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael vs. The Volcano
programme.desc: Raphael, convinced he is dying due to a faulty reading by Donatell's Health-O-Meter, becomes do-gooder THE Green Defender, popping up around the city foiling crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Duplicate
programme.desc: Donatello creates an egotistical Clone of himself who stuffs Donatello in a trunk.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ice Creature Cometh
programme.desc: Bebop dumps a vat of mutagen into the Arctic ice, creating a gigantic Ice Monster, who Krang unleashes on the city to help him steal thermal nuclear devices to free the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Cuts Loose
programme.desc: Muscleman fiend Wally Airhead captures Turtles with a runaway exercise machine trap to add their powers to his race of super musclemen, but Turtles escape.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pirate Radio
programme.desc: Krang plots to take city by luring citizens into an inter­dimensional "Krang's Chasm" at sea by inserting Shredder in place of DJ. Dickie Bark as a Pied Piper on steamship radio station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael, the Turtle of a Thousand Faces
programme.desc: Raphael disguises himself as Mad Dog McNutt, who is planning a heist of the Natural History museum.
programme.sub-title: Raphael, the Turtle of a Thousand Faces

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo, the Renaissance Turtle
programme.desc: Professor Mindbender fools the Mayor into installing Lex, a supercop robot, to clean up crime, but rewires him to arrest practically the whole city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Zach and the Alien Invaders
programme.desc: Zach's over-active imagination has him seeing Aliens everywhere. Sent to Military School, he discovers actual Aliens posing as officers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Welcome Back, Polarisoids!
programme.desc: The Polarisoids return to Earth unwittingly invited by Krang, bringing to life the alien Creatures caught as images on tape as a distraction so Krang can break into the city's computer systems.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Planet of the Turtleloids: Part 1
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder transport to the City Wild Animal Park with Bebop and Rocksteady to create an army of Mutants from the animals there.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rock Around the Block
programme.desc: Krang summons General Tragg from the Dimension X to keep the Turtles busy while Shredder places a remote control transmitter upon a rocket ship preparing to launch a satellite with a new super laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Krangenstein Lives
programme.desc: Under the Arctic Ocean Krang is tuning up his Robotic Body. While no one is looking, Bebop and Rocksteady inadvertently destroy an important computer chip and surreptitiously replace it with one from a video game.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are busy trying to decide what costumes to wear to this year's Channel Six Halloween party, April and Irma are doing a story on the reverse polarity magnet at Magno-Dyne Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Adventures in Turtle-Sitting
programme.desc: While Splinter is away on meditative satori, Donatello sets his sights on solving world hunger. He invents the food revivafiver, a device designed to reverse the aging process of food.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sword of Yurikawa
programme.desc: Krang plans to blow up the Tri-State Bridge just as a convoy of trucks carrying a rare form of toxic waste passes overhead.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Turtleoid
programme.desc: The Turtles go to the Top Notch Scientific Corporation to stand guard over the sonic disintegrator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shreeka's Revenge
programme.desc: Shreeka, an alien with an attitude and a vendetta against Krang, after having spent eons tracking him down, has finally found him.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Blabber Talker
programme.desc: Appa and Umma search for an excuse to avoid vacationing with the Lees. Janet scores a lucrative but awkward photography gig.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Kimchee gets conflicting dating advice from Jung and Shannon. Janet's outraged when she learns that Umma's sold off her childhood keepsakes.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appanticitis
programme.desc: Appa gives Umma feedback on an annoying habit and promptly regrets it. Janet bumps into an old flame and Jung considers giving reality TV a shot.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Hit 'n' Fun
programme.desc: A small fender bender leads to a big argument between Appa and Umma. Jung second-guesses a birthday greeting. Janet goes from mocker to mocked.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Lord of the Ring
programme.desc: Umma tries to find her missing wedding ring before Appa does. Jung crashes Janet's yoga class.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: The Trollop
programme.desc: Only the Mehtas, Janet and Gerald know thus far that Raj cancelled his wedding with only the latter two knowing he did so because he is still in love with Janet.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Couch Surfing
programme.desc: Appa is reluctant to have a house guest, but Umma is the one who ends up having problems with their visitor. Jung accuses Janet of being coldhearted and Shannon tackles workplace bullying .

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: The Help
programme.desc: Umma is mistaken for a server at a school event for Janet. Appa takes up math tutoring to prove his teaching prowess. Meanwhile, Shannon is finally single but isn't sure if Jung will make a move.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Victory
programme.desc: Luther informs Mitt Romney who won the election, and a non-stop party refuses to stop.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Gangsta Standoff
programme.desc: Two gang rivals get inside each other's heads, and a police officer hones his act.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Manly Tears
programme.desc: A tough guy cries in front of his crew, and substitute teacher Mr. Nostrand does not play.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dueling Hats
programme.desc: One man's bikini-clad woman is another man's mystery, and two friends step up their hat game.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Les Mis
programme.desc: Mr. Garvey clashes with students over club photos, and President Obama addresses the NSA scandal.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East/West Bowl Rap
programme.desc: Two women prepare to fight outside a club, and the Valets wonder why people mess with the Batmans.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass
programme.desc: Two slaves try to find a way out of fighting to the death, and a member of a Latin gang proves his toughness.

programme.title: Corporate: Thanks!
programme.desc: Thanks! Matt's broken "!" key strains his relationship with John and Kate, and Jake and Grace conspire to get rid of the office dog. Nihilistic, satirical sitcom from Comedy Central U.S. (S2, E04)

programme.title: Corporate: Mattchiavelli and the Piss Detective
programme.desc: Mattchiavelli and the P*ss Detective: Things get out of hand fast when Hampton DeVille starts tracking when people leave their desks. Nihilistic, satirical sitcom from Comedy Central U.S. (S2, E06)

programme.title: Corporate: Labour Day

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Happy Ummaversary

programme.title: Kim's Convenience

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil talks to mothers-in-law feuding with their sons-in-law and the relatives caught in the crossfire of these ongoing feuds.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Some couples vow "for better or worse." With a 50% divorce rate in America, in the midst of marital crises ranging from separation to unfaithfulness, Dr. Phil helps manage rocky marriages. Dr.Phil tells how to survive infidelity or when to call it quits.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bobby wants to peacefully co-parent with his ex-wife, Andrea, but says she's a liar, & a sex-addict who exposes their son, Kayden, 6, to her lifestyle. He says her bedroom a revolving door of men. Andrea says Bobby is obsessed with ruining her life.
programme.sub-title: Dr. Phil Help Me Escape My Co-Parenting Nightmare!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jean says her 17-year-old daughter, Cheyenne, was the all-American girl , a cheerleader, track star and straight-A honor student until she began dating Josh, a 28-year-old divorced father. Dr. Phil takes a look at Josh's history, should Jean be concerned?
programme.sub-title: He's Nearly 30 And Engaged To My Teen With Braces

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you imagine getting an inheritance, you might assume all your financial problems would be solved. But can the money be more trouble than it's worth?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are you the kind of neighbor who loans a cup of sugar and always waves hello, or do you keep to yourself and call the cops the minute you hear loud music? Dr. Phil talks to guests who say they definitely don't live in Mr. Roger's neighborhood!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil takes an intense look at the life of Star, a stay-at-home mom who fears that her dangerous habit may take a turn for the worse. Star's 11-year-old daughter, Autumn, sends Dr. Phil a poignant plea for help before tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a bizarre abuse case, Gypsy Rose Blanchard's mother forced her to pretend she was ill, undergo countless surgeries, shave her head, insert a feeding tube & use a wheelchair. A web of deceit & torture led to murder. Gypsy Rose talks with Dr. Phil.Pt. 1
programme.sub-title: Mother Knows Best: The Story Of Gypsy Rose Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Trisha, a mother and wife, who is live-streaming her entire life. Find out what caused Trisha to storm off and collapse on stage. Did Dr. Phil almost have to call the paramedics? Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: YouTube Obsessed Trisha's Dramatic Collapse On Stage Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you have a relative scheming to get money from a rich aunt, uncle or even parents when they pass away?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: If you dread Valentine's Day and don't have a creative bone in your body, take heart, because Dr. Phil and Robin are here to help the romantically challenged!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tom is 100% convinced his fiancée, Teaka, is cheating on him with his friends, neighbors, coworkers, & even the mailman! Tom has all-new video evidence to show Dr. Phil & Teaka to prove Teaka's unfaithfulness. Teaka declares she has never cheated on Tom.
programme.sub-title: Is My Fiance Cheating With The Mailman?!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Wife Nicole thought she knew her husband of 20 years, Carter, but all that changed as she uncovered a hidden secret. Nicole discovered Carter has been having a 4-year sexual affair with a man. Find out the shocking results a private investigator reveals.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Donna has extreme hatred for her daughter-in-law, Jen, and it's coming between her relationship with her son, Brad. Jen & Brad say they're so terrified of Donna, they changed the locks and sleep with a gun. Can Dr. Phil calm these feuding in-laws?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Baylen bravely posted TikTok videos of her daily struggles with Tourette syndrome and now has over 3 million followers. Singer/Influencer Lele Pons says she also suffers from OCD, Tourette syndrome, & depression. They discuss their experiences.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jason Collier was a perfect boyfriend, handsome, & a well-respected police chief of a Texas town. But multiple women he was dating discovered that Jason Collier was every woman's worst nightmare: a married man lying to his wife but also to them. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Texas Police Chief Leading Secret Triple Life Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are you a 'social media lurker?' How often do you scroll through social media platforms to stare at other people's photos and videos and decide that person is surely living their best life, and you are not. A deep dive into posting: real vs fake.
programme.sub-title: Social Media: The Real Vs. The Façade

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues investigating Lois' online relationships. Dr. Phil backs a search to Nigeria to locate Lois' current fiancé, "Paul Shaw." Lois asks Dr. Phil to fly him to the U.S. so they can start their future together. Conclusion Pt. 3
programme.sub-title: A Catfish Investigation: Where Is Paul Shaw? Pt.3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A severe case of Munchausen syndrome by proxy leads to murder. Gypsy Rose Blanchard decided that killing her own mother was her only way to escape years of abuse. She reveals her story to Dr. Phil in an exclusive interview.Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Gypsy Rose: From Wheelchair Bound To Jail For Murder Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a Dr. Phil first, a catfish who orchestrated several online dating deceptions faces her victims, in-studio. Plus, Ryan's ex-girlfriend, Holly, falsely accused him of posting intimate photographs & videos of her online after they broke up. Ryan speaks.
programme.sub-title: Love Scams: Why Did My Online Girlfriend Fake Her Death?

programme.desc: Charlotte is pushed to breaking point as lothario Gaz continues to pull anything in a skirt. Rebecca's feistiness intensifies as she faces competition to win one of the boy's affections... (S2, ep2)

programme.title: JAG: Mishap
programme.desc: "Skates", Harm's RIO when he was aboard the USS Patrick Henry, was the Landing Safety Officer in charge of the deck when a Tomcat crashes while making an emergency landing.

programme.title: JAG: Into the Breach
programme.desc: Harm and Mac agree to help guide young student "attorneys" at Iron Forge Naval Academy, a prep school for the US Naval Academy, as they conduct a mock trial.

programme.title: JAG: Boomerang (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hostilities between Harm and Brumby escalate both in and out of the courtroom and it takes Chegwidden, with Brumby's CO's approval to get them to deal with their anger

programme.title: JAG: People V. Gunny
programme.desc: Gunny is charged with gay-bashing following an off duty altercation outside a gay bar.

programme.title: JAG: The Bridge At Kang So Ri
programme.desc: Harm and Mac board a plane bound for Korea to investigate charges that GI's shot and killed civilians during the Korean War.
programme.sub-title: The Bridge At Kang So Ri

programme.title: JAG: Drop Zone
programme.desc: Mac is prosecuting a SEAL jumpmaster charged with causing the death of one of his men during a parachute insertion exercise.

programme.title: JAG: Real Deal Seal
programme.desc: Medal of Honor Navy SEAL Lt. Curtis Rivers is court-martialed for punching a Congressional candidate who claims to be a Navy SEAL.

programme.title: JAG: Overdue And Presumed Lost
programme.desc: A salvage company tries to claim rights to the wreckage of the USS Dolphin, a WW2 submarine that was lost the day before the attack on Pearl Harbor in 1941.

programme.title: JAG: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: Louis Cellucci is having a rough time aboard the flight deck of the USS Benjamin Harrison. Moments after he walks away from another failed attempt at fixing an F-14, shouts of Man Overboard! are heard across the deck.

programme.title: JAG: To Walk on Wings
programme.desc: Congresswoman Latham and a colleague watch four marine jumpers jump into the ocean from an M22 Osprey. With two marines left to jump, the plane is struck by a swell in the ocean. Harm and Mac are instructed to investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Guilt
programme.desc: When Captain Huddleston hears that the marine corporal has been charged with rape, he sends Lt. Colonel Sarah Mac MacKenzie to handle the case in a hot zone of Anti-American activity.

programme.title: JAG: Mixed Messages
programme.desc: An intruder shoots three Navy people, killing two. One of the dead is a friend of Harm, who protects his reputation. Webb, counter-espionage, and disinformation are involved; Bud solves it. Mac and Renee return to town; Mac leaves again.

programme.title: JAG: Ambush
programme.desc: Capt. Shepard leads his troop off its peacekeeping mission and into battle with the colonel of the rebel forces. Consequently, six marines die in the public incident. Harm is sent in to investigate despite a recent touch of bad luck in a string of trials.

programme.title: JAG: Jag-a-thon
programme.desc: The JAG gang takes part in a JAGathon, a charity-benefit marathon, which provides opportunities for personal pride and individual competitiveness. Sturgis feels uncertain, and Harm defends a sailor for impersonating an officer.

programme.title: JAG: The Mission
programme.desc: A spotter on the ground calls for an airstrike as he has identified 15 heavily armed suspected Al Qaeda members on horseback. JAG won’t approve the airstrike until the spotter is absolutely certain the men are Al Qaeda members.

programme.title: JAG: Defending His Honor
programme.desc: An ambulance pulls up to a crash site where a woman, Jennifer Wilson, is found injured and crying for her baby. Unbeknownst to her, the six-month-old baby died in the accident. A Navy judge stands accused of vehicular homicide.

programme.title: JAG: In Country
programme.desc: Central Command coordinates an airstrike on a confirmed target traveling through Afghanistan. After the strike is launched, marine troops assess the damage and they are disturbed to learn that they targeted the wrong vehicle and hit civilians instead.

programme.title: JAG: Enemy Below
programme.desc: Kabir is preparing an attack against the U.S. and was last seen crossing the border from Afghanistan to Iran. He is believed to have recruited Capt. Yerastov, a Russian submarine captain. Turner, Harm and Mac help in the hunt for the terrorists.

programme.title: JAG: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Bud has lost his right lower leg due to a mine in Afghanistan; during emergency surgery he faces bad trouble. Sturgis returns to Washington, and Harm and Mac disobey an order from the admiral. Bud encounters an astounding change of course.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Venetian Love Song - Part 1
programme.desc: While the Pacific Princess sails through the beautiful waters of Italy, a seemingly happy couple (Shelly Winters and Ernest Borgnine) reveals that their relationship is far from perfect.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Venetian Love Song - Part 2
programme.desc: Love, adventure and romantic hijinks are afloat when The Love Boat sails to the beautiful Eternal City of Rome and the sites of glorious Capri and Venice in a special two-hour premiere.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Same Wavelength/ Winning Isn't Everything/ A Honeymoon For Horace
programme.desc: A mindreader meets a man and uses the reading to improve her chances at getting his attention. Meanwhile, Capt. Stubing's friend brags about his son's accomplishments, but Vicki hears a totally different story.
programme.sub-title: Same Wavelength/ Winning Isn't Everything/ A Honeymoon For Horace

programme.title: The Love Boat: Too Many Dads/ Love Will Find A Way/ The Best Of Friends
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy is torn between his biological father, who he hasn't seen since he was a baby, and the stepfather who raised him. Meanwhile, Elaine tries to tell her parents that her fiance is a paraplegic.
programme.sub-title: Too Many Dads/ Love Will Find A Way/ The Best Of Friends

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Tomorrow Lady/ Father, Dear Father/ Still Life
programme.desc: A woman's (Greer Garson) ability to see the future may hinder her relationship with an attractive man. Plus, a single mother thinks she meets a divorced man traveling with his daughter, but that's not exactly the case.
programme.sub-title: The Tomorrow Lady/ Father, Dear Father/ Still Life

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Presence
programme.desc: Angelorum Dominicus suddenly appears aboard the Pacific Princess without a reservation and soon begins to spread love and happiness to everyone on the cruise, especially a little boy in need of an operation.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Groupies/ The Audition/ Doc'S Nephew
programme.desc: A female producer is adamant about not wanting to start a relationship with an actor, but the thespian has other plans. Meanwhile, a therapist goes on a cruise with his group, while Doc and his nephew compete for the affection of the same woman.
programme.sub-title: The Groupies/ The Audition/ Doc'S Nephew

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Captain's Replacement/ Sly As A Fox/ Here Comes The Bride -- Maybe
programme.desc: When Gopher suspects a skipper under Capt. Stubing's tutelage is trying to take his job, the crew jumps into action to protect their boss. Meanwhile, a lovely lady causes havoc when she boards with two men who are each after her hand.
programme.sub-title: The Captain's Replacement/ Sly As A Fox/ Here Comes The Bride -- Maybe

programme.title: The Love Boat: Gopher's Daisy/ Our Son, The Lawyer/ Salvaged Romance
programme.desc: A woman's (Joan Rivers) shyness around men is exacerbated by her recent mastectomy that is until she meets an understanding man. Meanwhile, when a married couple contemplates divorce, it's their son, who's also a lawyer, that gets caught in the middle.
programme.sub-title: Gopher's Daisy/ Our Son, The Lawyer/ Salvaged Romance

programme.title: The Love Boat: Fountain Of Youth/ Bad Luck Cabin/ Uncle Daddy
programme.desc: When an elderly man's granddaughter falls for one of his fresh-faced friends, the man seeks out some of the youth potion for himself. Meanwhile, things start moving a little too fast for Isaac and the woman he's dating.
programme.sub-title: Fountain Of Youth/ Bad Luck Cabin/ Uncle Daddy

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Professor Has Class/ When The Magic Disappears/ We, The Jury
programme.desc: A sarcastic woman (Anne Meara) goes on a rampage when she finds out she's on a cruise with the same man she's suing (Jerry Stiller) for damages. Meanwhile, a famous professor meets a former student who is hired to replace his mentor/
programme.sub-title: The Professor Has Class/ When The Magic Disappears/ We, The Jury

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Captain's Crush/ Out Of My Hair/ Off-Course Romance
programme.desc: When Stubing meets a gorgeous movie queen (Joan Collins), who recently shed her ninth husband, he is fascinated by her charm and beauty. Then, a man decides to prioritize golf over his wife, so the neglected woman decides to play ball with an old friend.
programme.sub-title: The Captain's Crush/ Out Of My Hair/ Off-Course Romance

programme.title: The Love Boat: Discount Romance/ Vicky'S Dilemma/ Loser, And Still Champ
programme.desc: The captain's daughter is put in a tough situation she is accused of stealing supplements from Doc's office. Then, Gopher's uncle (Red Button) falls in love with the lady who runs the ship's gift shop.
programme.sub-title: Discount Romance/ Vicky'S Dilemma/ Loser, And Still Champ

programme.title: The Love Boat: So Help Me Hannah/ The Maid Cleans Up/ Cpr, I.O.U
programme.desc: The vivacious Hannah Harvye (Mary Martin) immediately becomes involved with the crew and rekindles a romance with an old flame. An unassuming man (Ben Murphy) finds himself in a tight situation with a maid he's never met. Gopher saves a man's life.
programme.sub-title: So Help Me Hannah/ The Maid Cleans Up/ Cpr, I.O.U

programme.title: The Love Boat: Love Boat - The World's Greatest Kisser/ Don'T Take My Wife, Please/ The Reluctant Father
programme.desc: A jilted fiance hires a Mata Hari (Elaine Joyce) to find the crew member that ruined his wedding plans; a junior executive (Parker Stevenson) suffers in silence while his boss (David Doyle) lusts after his bride.
programme.sub-title: Love Boat - The World's Greatest Kisser/ Don'T Take My Wife, Please/ The Reluctant Father

programme.title: The Love Boat: Affair On Demand/ Friend Of The Family/ Just Another Pretty Face
programme.desc: A married couple finds out that their daughter is in love with the father's best friend, while a progressive woman agrees to help her romantic partner have an affair.
programme.sub-title: Affair On Demand/ Friend Of The Family/ Just Another Pretty Face

programme.title: The Love Boat: Rhino Of The Year/ One Last Time/ For Love Or Money
programme.desc: When an organization wants to give a crew member an award, Captain Stubing suggests Isaac. Meanwhile, a fun-loving guy tries to help out his heartbroken friend but finds himself in trouble after meeting an unusual woman.
programme.sub-title: Rhino Of The Year/ One Last Time/ For Love Or Money

programme.title: The Love Boat: Bricker's Boy/ Lotions Of Love/ The Hustlers
programme.desc: The professional escort of an older woman (Vera Miles) dallies with a young woman (Constance Forslund); an advertising whiz tries to impress his best client despite putdowns from her daughter.
programme.sub-title: Bricker's Boy/ Lotions Of Love/ The Hustlers

programme.title: Melrose Place: Coup De Grace
programme.desc: Taylor visits Nick in Dallas. After they sleep together, she convinces him to help her break up Kyle and Amanda.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Mama Mia
programme.desc: Jennifer warns Michael that their mother, Mia, is coming for a visit. Jennifer and Michael get into trouble shortly after Mom arrives.

programme.title: Melrose Place
programme.desc: Christine tries to convince Kyle to move on with his life. Later, Peter shows up in Sterling's hotel room with a tape recorder in the hopes of proving that Sterling is to blame for their rift.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Swing And A Mrs.
programme.desc: Kyle discovers a suicide note from Christine. He leaves the wedding, hoping to save her before it's too late.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Blunt Drama
programme.desc: Christine tries to back out of Nick's scam but Taylor threatens her when she tries to leave town.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Christine Runs Through It
programme.desc: Taylor and Nick order Christine to display signs of suicidal behavior in order to trick Peter, but he is too savvy for them.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Too Romantic For Words
programme.desc: Nick and Taylor send Amanda a note leading her to believe that Christine is going to commit suicide.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Four Affairs And A Pregnancy
programme.desc: Billy dedicates himself to making his marriage work, although he is still drawn to Jennifer.

programme.title: Melrose Place: M.P. Confidential
programme.desc: Sam is put off when Billy begins smothering her with attention. It doesn't help when she finds out his family believes they are engaged.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Nasty Minded Professor
programme.desc: Jennifer tries to help Jeff win back Samantha. Although she rejects him at first, Sam later grows jealous when she sees Jennifer having dinner with Jeff.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Divorce Dominican Style
programme.desc: Kyle tries to manipulate Taylor into revealing the truth about her scheme involving Christine. Amanda and Kyle's divorce is finalized.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Long Way To Tip-A-Roy
programme.desc: Rory poisons Amanda after she refuses to give him a share of the agency, then tries to stab Kyle. Peter admits his love for Amanda and breaks up with Lexi.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Match Made In Hell
programme.desc: Overcome with guilt about Lexi's plight, Megan convinces Brett to marry Lexi. Michael rebuffs Taylor's attempts to turn him into a responsible father.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Ball 'N' Jane
programme.desc: Michael attends a college reunion in Chicago, where he runs into Jane. Jane then follows Michael back to Los Angeles in the hopes of rekindling their romance.

programme.title: Melrose Place: As Bad As It Gets
programme.desc: Michael has Taylor shipped away in an ambulance. Jane is furious to learn of the pregnancy and rents an apartment at the complex.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Buona Sera, Mr. Campbell, Part 1
programme.desc: Beck's men hold Amanda hostage in a desolate cabin. A disgusted Jeff breaks up with Sam.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Buona Sera, Mr. Campbell, Part 2
programme.desc: The kidnapper pursues Amanda through the woods in the midst of the storm. Megan stows away on the boat and foils Brett's attempt to kill Lexi.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The World According To Matt
programme.desc: Amanda is given a diary in which Matt recorded secrets about his friends and neighbors. Peter believes that the missing page relates to Amanda's feelings for him, and snoops in her apartment.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Where The Hookers Grow
programme.desc: Kyle is jealous of the amount of time Amanda spends with the recuperating Peter. Michael follows Megan to her parent's home and is stunned to find that the family is wealthy.

programme.desc: Valentine’s Day gets complicated when Sabrina learns two boys are vying for her heart.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Welcome Back Duke

programme.sub-title: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)

programme.desc: Sabrina’s Sweet 16 becomes a truly magical birthday when she discovers she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Magic Joel

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sweet N’ Sour Victory

programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts use magic to show an unfair teacher that what goes around comes around.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Jenny’s Non-Dream

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Through The Looking Glass
programme.desc: Sabrina's in a foul mood and only baseball great Brady Anderson can help her out of her slump.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Hilda And Zelda: The Teenage Years

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Mars Attracts
programme.desc: A winter vacation to Mars and a cute ski instructor test Sabrina’s feelings for Harvey.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: First Kiss

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sweet Charity

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Cat Showdown
programme.desc: Salem enters a cat show to make some fast cash, but Sabrina uncovers a fur-raising scandal.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: As Westbridge Turns

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Great Mistake
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a little trouble when she sneaks out of the house after being grounded.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Crucible

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Troll Bride
programme.desc: When Sabrina is tricked into marrying a troll, only a prince – a.k.a. Harvey – can save her.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sabrina's 17th birthday turns stressful when she has to start studying for her witch's license.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sabrina learns about the responsibilities that come with using magic when she earns her witch’s learner’s permit.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dummy For Love
programme.desc: Sabrina takes advantage of Vice Principal Kraft’s attraction to Aunt Hilda.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dante’s Inferno

programme.desc: A "cured" friend returns; a dream family reunion becomes a reality; the race for a vaccine begins after a frolic with the Dubstep Bees.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Dr. Emilia and her army work through the death ivy, while the alliance crafts cunning traps.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.sub-title: Grow Grrrl and Earthy B.B. Plant Sit!

programme.title: Kung Fu Sock

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Hearing of a nearby Grass-type Pokémon tournament, Ash decides to enter...and a rivalry soon begins to bloom amid the heat of battle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Pikachu’s in trouble when an orchard owner mistakes it for one of the hungry Pichu that have ransacked her harvests. Ash wants to help, but will the fruits of his labor satisfy both the orchard owner and the Pokémon?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When the smoke clears after their latest run-in with Team Rocket, our heroes quickly realize that Togepi is missing! As they begin the search, Togepi has started making friends in another part of the forest.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Finally reaching Ecruteak City, our heroes set out to find the Gym, but wind up inside a decaying tower instead. Suddenly, the tower bursts into flames with our heroes trapped inside! How can they escape?
programme.sub-title: A Ghost Of A Chance (Title Changed After 9/11)

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: It is finally time for Ash’s fourth Gym battle! After seeing Morty’s powerful Gengar in action, Ash is under no illusions about how tough these Ghost-type Pokémon will be! Can he claim the Fog Badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When our heroes meet five beautiful sisters in a cultural garden, they are soon challenged to a series of testing battles involving Eevee and some of its evolved forms!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A mischievous flock of Murkrow cause trouble for Ash and Team Rocket by stealing some of their most prized possessions! Now, the race is on to get them back!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: In a harsh desert landscape, a strange light appears, and a city of ruins rises up before our heroes. But how did the city come to be this way? Could it have something to do with the beautiful light show?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: There’s a food thief amongst our heroes...could it have anything to do with the cute and cuddly Teddiursa who has joined them on their journey?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When our heroes are reunited with Pokémon photographer Todd Snap, he starts them on an adventure to find the Legendary Pokémon Articuno!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Still searching for Articuno, our heroes are found by a trio of keen-nosed, snuffling Swinub, and Team Rocket are keen on sniffing them out for profit!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Our heroes have finally found Articuno, but they’ve led Team Rocket right to the Legendary Pokémon as well!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Ash and the gang are rescued by a courier service of Arcanine and Growlithe, and in turn must rescue them and their cargo of Fire Stones from the burning ambition of Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Our heroes find themselves in a village that adores Dunsparce and try to help one unlucky Trainer find one of his own!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The race is on to find Team Rocket’s Wobbuffet when it runs off with the key to an indestructible cage…a cage that holds Ash's Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When Brock falls ill, it’s up to Ash and Misty to keep the group well and fed. But their inexperience, and the meddling of Team Rocket, makes their new jobs not-so-simple!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Ash finds out about a local Pokémon Sumo competition and decides he wants to enter. He has just the Pokémon for the job: the mighty Snorlax!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A supposed Pokémon translator helps an exhausted Pikachu out on the road, but our heroes soon discover he is wanted by the police for fraud. Whose story do they believe?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Hearing of ancient relics that allow the wearer to control any Pokémon, Jessie, James, and Meowth are preparing to crash an excavation to dig up the treasure of a lifetime!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: An aging artist and his Smeargle assistants get in some hot water when they attempt to turn a town into their next great masterpiece!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Brock finally meets his match when another Trainer develops a mad crush on him…but with the tables turned, he's not entirely sure how to behave around her!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After becoming accidentally locked inside an electrical generator, Ash and Chikorita will have to avoid the aggressive security Pokémon and Team Rocket to make it out safely!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Bayleef is still getting used to its newly evolved form, and when Ash becomes impatient, it gets upset and runs away. Can our hero find his friend again and make amends?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A young Natu fortune-teller learning his craft is lacking confidence in front of an audience. Can Ash help encourage the young artist’s talent?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Our heroes take part in a high-speed race in a hot air balloon, but the stakes are raised when Team Rocket enters as well, causing chaos in the clouds!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When a hooded man leaves a Smoochum with our heroes, it unravels a tale that will take them all the way to the bright lights of the silver screen!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Ash and his friends are approached by a civil engineer with a problem: she has a team of Ground-type Pokémon working to build a tunnel, but they're terrified of the water that keeps leaking in! Can our heroes help?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Aboard a luxury blimp, Team Rocket are trying to pinch a few valuables from wealthy travelers—but some courageous Kecleon are on hand to get the better of them!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Misty finally meets one of her idols, a Nurse Joy who specializes in Water types! But the reality doesn’t live up to the dream when Nurse Joy reveals that she doesn't share Misty’s love for aquatic Pokémon after all…

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Ash and his friends have one last obstacle before Olivine City: a scorching desert! And when Cyndaquil goes missing, they have more than the heat to deal with!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Ash’s next Gym battle is under way, but it's soon called off by Jasmine, the real Olivine Gym Leader, who claims that Ash has been battling an impostor! Will Ash now get the challenge he’s been searching for?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After receiving the medicine in Cianwood City, our heroes soon discover the Gym Leader training hard with his Machoke. It's only a matter of time before Ash decides to go toe to toe with Chuck’s Fighting-type Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: In a scuffle with Team Rocket, Ash and friends are thrown from the ship bearing them to the Whirl Islands! Can they escape the powerful whirlpools that threaten to drag them down?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The Pidgey on a protected island don’t have to worry about being attacked, so most have lost interest in flying. But one of them still dreams of soaring beyond the stars! Can Ash and friends help?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Our heroes pass a small mountain village just in time for the annual Chinchou migration. The village always sends Trainers to protect the Chinchou on their journey—but will they be enough to stop Team Rocket?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When a family’s home is threatened by the Corsola who live nearby, it’s Ash and friends to the rescue…and maybe Misty can finally catch that Corsola she’s been after!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: After our heroes miss a ferry, they meet a diver who offers to take them to the next island…but they’re soon distracted by tales of treasure aboard a sunken ship!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When they’re not competing in the Whirl Cup, Ash and Misty try to help a young Trainer whose Octillery has been rejected by its Remoraid friends after evolving.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: After winning their preliminary rounds, Ash and Misty face formidable opponents in the Whirl Cup. Meanwhile, the Team Rocket trio have their eyes on stealing the tournament’s prize!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: It’s the second round of the Whirl Cup, and Ash and Misty have been paired up against each other! Who will come out on top? And will Team Rocket’s plan to distract the police be successful?
