programme.desc: Desmond is obsessed with the role that his actress-wife played 50 years ago. He finds a cursed reel that lets him bring the Lili character to life, by pushing an innocent female victim into the film.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: A lonely, somewhat twisted mortician stumble upon the cursed properties of an antique embalmers' aspirator.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: A famous author of real-life biographies of serial killers, famed for his insights, owes his success to an antique pen.

programme.title: Friday The 13th: The Series
programme.desc: Micki, Johnny, and Jack are taking a break, and stargazing in Jack's old hometown. However, a ghostly biker gang, the Midnight Riders, rolls into town.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Healer/Children's Zoo/Kentucky Rye
programme.desc: Jackie steals a healing stone but loses his way/A girl's zoo visit transforms her parents' relationship/Bob enters a strange bar post-accident.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Little Boy Lost/Wish Bank/Nightcrawlers
programme.desc: Photographer faces dilemma & encounters familiar boy/Janice gets lamp with wish restrictions/Trooper's diner stop unveils vet's nightmares.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Ye Gods
programme.desc: Cupid arrives in the modern world. A love spell for his target does not work as well as he hopes.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: If She Dies
programme.desc: A year after his wife died a man is involved in a car accident that leaves his young daughter in a coma. On his way home the man has a vision.

programme.title: New Twilight Zone: Examination Day/A Message From Charity
programme.desc: In the far future, twelve-year-old Dickie must take the government intelligence test/A 16-year old in 1985 finds himself in telepathic contact with a girl in 1700. Her knowledge of the future gets her accused of being a witch.

programme.title: 100 Years of Horror
programme.desc: Nothing like a good ghost story  except a centurys worth of films filled with more ghost stories!

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Gypsy Jigsaw
programme.desc: Sydney receives a deck of rare Tarot cards from her recently deceased friend. The infamous, previously unmentioned Vulture was after him. Sydney enlists Claudia to help.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Three Rivers to Cross
programme.desc: According to local monks, the Famed Jade Empress is hidden in the valley that will be flooded when the Three Rivers Dam's flood gates have their grand opening.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Lost Contact
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel and billionaire entrepreneur Rod Thorson parachute into the Myanmar jungle to rescue a relic-hunting team hired by Thorson to locate an ancient sacrificial bowl.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Cross of Voodoo
programme.desc: When two graduate students on the trail of the Haitian Cross of Utu disappear in New Orleans, Sydney and Nigel go down on the bayou to find them.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are on a trip, so Claudia decides to help Sydney's friend Roger to find Julius Caesar's armor, but relic hunting is not her talent.

programme.title: Matlock: The Abduction
programme.desc: While attending a UCLA Law seminar, Matlock and Michelle end up in a dangerous dilemma. After giving Matlock inside information regarding an upcoming hit his former law school classmate is involved in a fatal hit and run.

programme.title: Matlock: Mr. Awesome
programme.desc: Matlock defends Anne Johnson, a single mother who’s been accused of murdering her recently estranged boyfriend.

programme.title: Matlock: The Evening News (Part 1)
programme.desc: A phony story is planted on the nightly news when a corrupt land developer pays off the on-air talent but when the producer fakes his own death, the anchorwoman unwittingly helps him along, never realizing it’s somebody else she killed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Evening News (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hired to defend an innocent newscaster, Matlock is baffled until evidence turns up that puts him on the trail of the real killer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Assassination (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock’s daughter’s surprise visit home is interrupted when a judge, on a Blue Ribbon panel investigating the assassination of the town Mayor, is accused of sexual assault and seeks Matlock’s counsel.

programme.title: Matlock: The Assassination (Part 2)
programme.desc: When his daughter is jailed for contempt Matlock takes over her case. Now it is up to him to uncover the truth behind a sinister cover-up that involves high government officials, including the Chief of Police, in a child pornography ring and a murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Vacation (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock and his daughter Leanne arrive at a seaside resort to plan their new law partnership, they discover the manager has been murdered.

programme.title: Matlock: The Vacation (Part 2)
programme.desc: While vacationing with his daughter, Matlock tries to solve the murder of the hotel manager at their seaside resort.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ghost
programme.desc: A friend of Matlock’s, Mike Wilson, has been murdered and his wife has been accused of the crime.

programme.title: Matlock: The Singer
programme.desc: When a successful country music star is murdered, the promoter she fired – Steve Fisher – becomes the logical suspect.

programme.title: Matlock: The Juror
programme.desc: Matlock’s on jury duty, and the case against a man-about-town who stands to gain a fortune from his wife’s death seems airtight. Close examination of the evidence suggests otherwise to Ben.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 1)
programme.desc: When multi-millionaire Marvin Estes dies from an apparent suicide, leaving his fortune to supposed girlfriend Theresa LaValle, Matlock must find the missing beneficary.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 2)
programme.desc: When it’s discovered that a multimillionaire’s suicide is actually murder, Rick Stafford, the nephew recently cut out of his uncle’s will, is the #1 suspect. However, Matlock suspects other players in this high-stakes game of foul play

programme.title: Matlock: The Debt
programme.desc: Even though her former husband was a liar and a cheat, Leanne Matlock refuses to believe he was capable of murdering his philandering boss.

programme.title: Matlock: The Revenge
programme.desc: When testifying as a witness in a robbery case, Matlock is made to look like a fool. It soon becomes apparent that someone is playing tricks on him that threaten his credibility and safety.

programme.title: Matlock: The Obsession
programme.desc: Matlock is disturbed by frightening dreams that apparently give him clues to the murder of a doctor at a clinic patronized by celebrities. He even begins to wonder if he’s psychic.

programme.title: Matlock: The Divorce
programme.desc: It’s War of The Roses, Freudian style as divorcing psychiatrists forsake their couches for the courtroom. Matlock gets caught in the middle of a brutal battle that bruises more than egos.

programme.title: Matlock: The Final Affair (Part 1)
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: Matlock: The Final Affair (Part 2)
programme.desc: When Matlock looks into the double murder of a man studying for the ministry and the stabbing death of his wife, it looks like the case is closed when the wife’s lover is charged.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Paulina offers the girls advice on how to successfully model with a variety of items, including fish and toilet paper.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In the cycle 11 finale, the three finalists put their Top Model experience to the test when they shoot their final CoverGirl commercial & print ad.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls head to Bergdorff’s in New York City for makeovers! After receiving their new looks, the girls do their first photo session with Nigel Barker and must light themselves up.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls learn runway etiquette with Miss J and walk the runway in a Jill Stuart fashion show. Two previous Top Model contestants surprise the girls and offer runway advice.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Cycle three contestant and model Tocarra drops by to host a slumber party & teaches the girls some helpful hints for a career in the modeling business.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The house is divided and confrontational after last week’s shocking admission from one girl at the elimination panel.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.desc: The girls land in an exotic overseas destination and immediately test their navigation skills during a scavenger hunt around the city.

programme.desc: The five remaining girls learn they will have to go on go-sees with five different designers around the city.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The ladies rescue a stranded Tyra Banks on their way to the Brazilian Jungle for this week’s photoshoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The final ten sample the flamboyant world of high fashion in a catwalk show with unusual accessories, before bearing all for a nude shoot.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 7
programme.desc: The contestants demonstrate their acting skills in milk commercials before taking part in a photoshoot inspired by classic children's stories.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 8
programme.desc: Journalist Hilary Alexander quizzes the would-be catwalk stars on the industry they are so eager to become part of. The winners are treated to a party with former contestants including last year's winner Letitia Herod.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 9
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson enrols the seven remaining contestants in a Fashion Targets Breast Cancer catwalk event for their biggest showcase yet and they also take part in a beauty shoot with a cosmetics company.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 10
programme.desc: The six remaining girls arrive in Barbados and hit the waves for a surfing-themed tourism advert. The action remains on the water for a boat-based photoshoot with Dannii Minogue and a leading hair-care brand, ahead of the dreaded elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 11
programme.desc: The final five star in a music video with Bajan pop group Cover Drive and have to learn a complicated dance routine, before Elle Macpherson challenges the contestants to model jewellery in a photoshoot set in a limestone cavern.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 12
programme.desc: The four remaining girls compete for a place in next week's final, demonstrating what they have learnt by styling themselves for a Bajan magazine cover shoot. After that, Tyson Beckford sets the contestants a challenge at a sugar plantation.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 13
programme.desc: The three remaining contestants take part in their final photoshoot a Caribbean carnival-themed catwalk show infront of an audience of industry bigwigs. Elle Macpherson, Tyson Beckford and Dannii Minogue then select the winner.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 1
programme.desc: Dannii Minogue joins host Elle Macpherson and Tyson Beckford as 28 hopefuls begin their battle for a modelling contract with a leading agency. The girls pull out all the stops but only half of them will survive the cull.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 2
programme.desc: The contestants head to the National Wedding Show at Birmingham's NEC to be coached in the art of the catwalk by model Jade Parfitt.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 3
programme.desc: It's time for the contestants to receive their makeovers and host Elle Macpherson embraces the challenge by opting for a new look herself. After their transformations, the girls pose like professional gymnasts with Olympian Louis Smith.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 4
programme.desc: Chemistry with the camera is imperative for a top model, so to separate the sizzlers from the fizzlers, the girls must pose with male models.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 5
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson shares her top tips in a modelling workshop before Tyson challenges the girls to shine on a shoot in an ex-coal mine.
